title: YouTube Operations Manager
description:
We are a fast-growing YouTube media company running multiple YouTube channels across different niches and languages.



Our team includes scriptwriters, video editors, thumbnail designers, and researchers. We are now looking for a highly intelligent and organized operator who can become the founder’s right hand and help manage daily operations.



This is not a basic VA job. You will help build systems, manage people, and execute ideas quickly.



Your Responsibilities



• Manage the video production pipeline

• Coordinate editors, writers, and thumbnail designers

• Ensure videos are delivered on time

• Track channel analytics and performance

• Improve workflows and systems

• Create task lists and assign work to the team

• Help launch new YouTube channels and projects

• Identify problems and suggest solutions



Your goal will be to keep the entire operation organized and running smoothly.

You will have a budget, that you can use to outsource tasks of your own to other people, as long as the operation runs smoothly.



Requirements



• Excellent English communication

• Extremely organized and proactive

• Comfortable managing remote teams

• Strong problem-solving skills

• Experience with spreadsheets and task management tools



Experience with YouTube or content production is a big advantage.



Flexible schedule, but you must be available for regular communication with the founder.

Performance bonuses available.



Starting salary is 1500, projected salary is
, after that it won't increase anymore but there will still be bonuses available



Application Instructions (IMPORTANT)

To apply, please submit:



-Your resume or work experience

-A 2–3 minute introduction video where you:

-Introduce yourself

-Explain your previous work experience

-Describe any experience managing teams or projects

-Upload the video to Google Drive or Loom and include the link in your application.

-Start your application with the word “OPERATOR” so we know you read the entire job post.

title: Amazon Arbitrage Product Research Specialist
description:
We are looking for an experienced Amazon Arbitrage Product Research Specialist to help us build a list of high-quality leads for our business. We already have an existing leads list, and now we need new, highly qualified leads to grow and scale.



You will be responsible for finding profitable products on Amazon based on our strict checklist and criteria. This is a part-time role (1–2 hours per day) to start, with the goal of becoming a full-time position within the next 2 months if the leads you provide are consistent and high quality.



Responsibilities:



Research and analyze products on Amazon for Online Arbitrage opportunities.



Follow our exact checklist to ensure product quality, including:



Minimum 30% ROI (Return on Investment)



At least 25 sales per month



Amazon should not be a competitor on the listing



Products must not have IP issues or be Private Label



Products should be easy to ungate (10 units on invoice requirement)



Provide 5–10 quality leads per day in the beginning.



Maintain accurate records of all leads.



Communicate progress daily.



Requirements:



2+ years of proven experience in Amazon Online Arbitrage product research.



Strong knowledge of sourcing tools such as Tactical Arbitrage, Keepa, SellerAmp, or other similar tools.



Ability to evaluate competition, sales rank, ROI, and Amazon restrictions.



Detail-oriented and able to strictly follow instructions.



High level of integrity – we are looking for long-term collaboration.



Nice to Have:



Experience working with wholesale suppliers and ungating processes.



Familiarity with Google Sheets / Excel for reporting.



What We Offer:



Starting with part-time work (1–2 hours/day).



Opportunity to grow into a full-time long-term position based on performance.



Competitive pay for high-quality, consistent leads.



Long-term, stable collaboration with a growing international business.



How to Apply:



Send us your resume/CV with your experience in Amazon Arbitrage.



Provide 3–5 sample leads that you have researched according to the checklist above (30% ROI, 25+ sales/month, no Amazon competition, etc.).



Tell us briefly about the tools you use and your workflow.



Only applicants who submit qualified sample leads will be considered.

title: Gohighlevel Strategist
description:
Overview

We are a home construction and renovation company seeking a technical GoHighLevel Expert to manage and optimize our CRM. This is a part-time role focused on systems architecture, with the potential to expand into more hours for the right candidate who possesses sales talent.

Role Details

• Location: Remote (OnlineJobs.ph)

• Status: Part-Time (20 Hours per week)

• Operating Hours: Work must be completed within the window of EST 8:30 AM – 6:30 PM.

• Potential for Growth: An additional 20 hours per week (totaling 40) is available for candidates with strong Outbound Appointment Setting skills.

Key Responsibilities

• Workflow Architecture: Map out and build sophisticated GHL workflows to improve business processes. You must be able to "draw" the logic before building.

• Advanced Troubleshooting: Act as the technical lead for GHL. You must be able to audit execution logs, identify why triggers failed, and fix system errors independently.

• Collaboration: Work closely with founders and various consultants to optimize system performance and lead flow.

• Optional Sales Support: For candidates with the right talent, managing outbound appointment setting (95% outbound focus) to convert leads into renovation estimates.

Requirements

• Expert GHL Knowledge: Deep experience with Workflows, Triggers, Snapshots, and API troubleshooting.

• Sound Troubleshooting Skills: A proven ability to diagnose and resolve technical bottlenecks quickly.

• Process Visualization: Comfort using tools like L
 or Whimsical to design workflows.

• Professionalism: High-level English and the ability to work collaboratively with a US-based team.

Important Communication Policy

• Direct Office Contact: Under no circumstances are applicants permitted to contact the physical construction office or use its public business lines. All communication regarding this position must stay within this platform. Failure to follow this rule results in immediate disqualification.

How to Apply

Please send a message with the subject line "GHL Architect - [Your Name]" and include:

1. GHL Experience: A summary of the most complex system you have built and how you handle troubleshooting.

2. Optional Skills: State whether or not you have experience/interest in outbound appointment setting.

3. Availability: Confirm your availability within the EST 8:30 AM – 6:30 PM window.

title: Shorts Research Strategist
description:
We are looking for a Shorts Strategist who understands virality, psychology, and attention  and can watch my YouTube videos and long form content, and identify which parts can go viral. This is NOT a video editing job. 



I can train you for this role, because this is what I am currently doing but if so, I need you to be ready to learn.



As a Shorts Strategist Your job is to view existing content, determines what may go viral, and secondly, research what currently is going viral in the social skills education niche.



This is not just a clipping job.

This is a strategy + pattern-recognition role.



Your Core Responsibilities

1 Mine Viral Clips From Existing Content

2 Go through past YouTube videos, livestreams, and trainings

Identify and extract 30–60 short clips (30–60 seconds) with strong viral potential



Focus on:

Pattern interrupts

Bold statements

Emotional spikes

Controversial takes

Clear, actionable advice



Deliver clips formatted and structured for YouTube Shorts (and repurposable to Reels/TikTok)



2 Trend Research & Replication Strategy



Research what is currently going viral in:

Social skills

Dating psychology

Masculinity

Communication skills 

Consolidate up to 60 replicable video ideas per month (approx. 2/day)



You must understand or learn to understand:

Why people stop scrolling

Why they comment

Why they argue

Why they share



Trial Task

We trial all potential tea
mbers.



Please:



Go through several videos on the High Integrity Skills channel:





Select up to 2 clips (max 30 seconds each) that you believe could go viral.



Submit:

Video URL

Timestamp

Why you chose it

Proposed hook/caption for shorts first frame (thumbnail)



To Apply, Answer These:

What is your quote / price for the trial task?

What is your expected monthly salary for this role (full-time)?

What do you think you deserve this monthly salary that you wish to have?

Do you have any proof of work that demonstrates you would excel at this job?

title: Finance Assistant – UK Property Development Business
description:
Finance Assistant – UK Property Development

Remote Freelance VA

$5 per hour | 2 Hours Per Week | Long-Term Role



About Us

We are hiring for a UK-based property development company focused on buying, refurbishing, and selling properties. We also manage rental properties.



We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Finance Assistant to support the day-to-day financial operations of the business.



This is a long-term remote position with increasing hours as we grow.



Role Overview

This role focuses on operational finance tasks, including:

 • Transaction classification

 • Invoice logging

 • Expense tracking

 • Contractor payments

 • Rent tracking

 • Investor interest tracking



You will work closely with the Bookkeeper, who handles reconciliations and financial oversight.



Core Responsibilities

Expense & Transaction Processing

 • Upload receipts to Xero

 • Assign transactions to correct property projects

 • Record supplier invoices



Invoice & Payment Management

 • Log invoices

 • Submit for approval

 • Prepare payments

 • Issue invoices when required



Property Accounting

 • Record completion statements in Xero

 • Allocate costs to correct projects

 • Track refurbishment spend



Rental & Managing Agent Payments

 • Record gross rent correctly

 • Separate managing agent fees

 • Allocate maintenance costs



Investor & Loan Tracking

 • Track investor repayments

 • Record interest schedules

 • Prepare simple interest summaries



There may also be some general admin and assitant work required as the role develops.



What This Role Does NOT Include



This role does NOT include:

 • Bank reconciliations

 • Capitalisation decisions

title: Accounting Manager  (CPA Preferred)
description:
About Us



We are a fast-growing US-based digital marketing company generating $10M+ in annual revenue, with multiple LLCs operating under one ownership structure. Our team is distributed across the US and the Philippines. As we continue to scale, we are seeking a highly experienced Controller to lead accounting operations, oversee multi-entity financial management, and build scalable financial infrastructure to support continued growth.



This is a senior-level leadership role with significant ownership and visibility.



The Role



The Accounting Manager will own the full accounting function across multiple US-based entities. This role requires strong knowledge of US GAAP, multi-entity accounting, intercompany transactions, and consolidated reporting.. You will work directly with executive leadership and external US CPA firms to ensure financial accuracy, compliance, and operational efficiency.



This is not a bookkeeping role — this is a strategic, hands-on accounting leadership position.



Key Responsibilities

Financial Leadership & Close Management



Lead monthly, quarterly, and annual close processes

Prepare accurate GAAP-compliant financial statements

Deliver consolidated reporting across multiple LLCs

Maintain clean general ledger structure and documentation



Multi-Entity & Intercompany Accounting

Manage accounting across several related US entities

Oversee intercompany allocations, eliminations, and reconciliations

Ensure entity-level performance visibility and reporting clarity



Revenue & Agency Accounting

Oversee revenue recognition (retainers, project-based, performance contracts)

Properly account for client pass-through ad spend

Monitor gross margins, operating leverage, and cost structure



Cash Flow & Financial Planning

Manage cash flow forecasting and working capital planning

Support budgeting and financial planning initiatives

Ensure appropriate tax reserves and owner distributions



Tax & Compliance Coordination

Act as liaison with US-based CPA and tax advisors

Support multi-state compliance and 1099 reporting

Ensure audit readiness and strong internal controls



Systems & Process Development

Improve and document accounting processes

Optimize accounting tech stack (QuickBooks, 
, Ramp/Brex, payroll platforms, etc.)

Lead and coordinate accounting support tea
mbers (US & PH-based staff)



Required Qualifications



8+ years of progressive accounting experience

Proven experience managing accounting for US-based companies

Strong knowledge of US GAAP and financial reporting standards

Direct experience with multi-entity accounting and inter-company transactions

Experience supporting companies generating $10M+ in revenue

Advanced proficiency in QuickBooks Online or equivalent systems

Strong leadership and remote team collaboration skills



Preferred



CPA strongly preferred 

Experience in digital marketing, agency, consulting, or service-based business

Experience building accounting systems in a scaling organization

Familiarity with distributed teams (US + offshore staff)



What Success Looks Like

Month-end close completed accurately and on time

Consolidated reporting provides clear financial visibility

Intercompany accounting is clean and structured

Cash flow is proactively managed

Financial systems are scalable for continued growth beyond $10M



Why Join Us?



High-impact leadership role in a growing US company

Direct access to executive leadership

Opportunity to build and scale financial operations across multiple ventures





To Apply



Please submit your resume along with a an audio or video introduction detailing:

Description of experience managing US-based entities

Experience with multi-entity or consolidated accounting

Revenue range of companies previously supported

title: Accounting Manager
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Accountant to join our team. The Accounting Manager  will play a pivotal role in overseeing our financial operations, ensuring compliance with GAAP and US Taxation regulations, and managing financial reporting. This position requires a Certified Public Accountant (CPA) with a strong background in accounting, auditing, and taxation. The ideal candidate should also possess exceptional analytical skills and expertise in financial software such as Quickbooks and Microsoft Excel.



Responsibilities:



Financial Management:

Oversee and manage all financial activities, including budgeting, forecasting, and financial reporting.

Ensure the company's financial operations are compliant with GAAP and US Taxation regulations.



Auditing and Compliance:

Conduct regular financial audits to maintain accuracy and integrity of financial data.

Work with external auditors to facilitate annual financial audits.



Taxation:

Manage all aspects of tax compliance, including federal, state, and local tax filings.

Stay updated on changes in tax regulations and implement necessary adjustments.



Accounting Software Expertise:

Utilize expertise in Quickbooks, Netsuite, and Microsoft Excel to streamline financial processes and reporting.

Implement and maintain effective accounting systems and internal controls.



Financial Reporting:

Prepare and present accurate and timely financial statements to senior management and stakeholders.

Generate financial analysis reports for decision-making purposes.



Cash Flow Management:

Monitor and manage cash flow to ensure sufficient liquidity for operational needs.

Develop and implement cash flow forecasting models.



Financial Strategy:

Collaborate with executive leadership to develop and execute financial strategies that support business goals and growth.



Requirements:



Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field (Master's degree preferred).

Certified Public Accountant (CPA) certification is required.

Extensive knowledge of Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP) and US Taxation regulations.

Proven auditing experience, preferably in a managerial role.

Expertise in financial software, including Quickbooks, Netsuite, and Microsoft Excel.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

Excellent communication and leadership abilities.

Detail-oriented and highly organized.

Ability to work in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.

Experience working with US companies





If you meet these qualifications and are looking for a challenging and rewarding opportunity, please submit your resume and an audio introduction of your qualifications

title: Remote Primary Care Nurse (RN)
description:
About Mulberry Health



Mulberry Health is a forward-thinking healthcare provider dedicated to delivering exceptional primary care services remotely. We are committed to leveraging technology to provide accessible, high-quality care to our patients. We are expanding our team and looking for three dedicated and skilled nurses from the Philippines to join us in our mission.



Job Summary



We are seeking experienced and compassionate Remote Primary Care Nurses to provide comprehensive virtual nursing care and back-office support. The ideal candidates will be responsible for a combination of clinical and administrative tasks, ensuring our patients receive the best possible care and our operations run smoothly. This is a full-time, remote position for candidates based in the Philippines.



Key Responsibilities



Primary Care Nursing (70%):

- Conduct virtual patient consultations via phone and video to assess patient conditions, provide nursing care, and offer patient education.

- Monitor and document patient vital signs, symptoms, and health progress in the EMR system.

- Collaborate with a multidisciplinary team of physicians, specialists, and other healthcare professionals to coordinate patient care.

- Develop and implement individualized patient care plans.

- Assist patients with medication management and adherence.



MA Back-Office Responsibilities (30%):

- Manage patient appointments, including scheduling, rescheduling, and sending reminders.

- Handle administrative tasks such as processing medical billing, managing patient records, and ensuring data accuracy.

- Transcribe physician's notes and update patient charts in the EMR system.

- Assist with prior authorizations and other insurance-related tasks.



Required Qualifications:

- Active and unrestricted Registered Nurse (RN) license in the Philippines (PRC License).

- Minimum of 2 years of clinical experience in a hospital or primary care setting.

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.

- Reliable high-speed internet connection (minimum 150 Mbps) and a quiet, professional home office setup.

- Strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently.

- Must be available Mon-Fri, 9am-5pm Arizona time (MST/MDT).



Preferred Qualifications:

- Previous experience in a remote nursing or telehealth role.

- Proficiency with EMR/EHR systems, with a strong preference for eClinicalWorks (ECW). Experience with Epic, Athena, or similar platforms is also valued.

- US Registered Nurse (USRN) license is a strong advantage but not required.

- BLS and/or ACLS certifications are highly desirable.



Compensation and Benefits:

- Competitive hourly rate: $5.00 - $8.00 USD per hour (commensurate with experience)

- 15 days paid time off (PTO) annually

- 10 paid US holidays

- Opportunities for ongoing training and career advancement



To Apply:

Please send your resume (PDF) and a short 1-2 minute video introduction to 
 with the subject line: "Application for Remote Primary Care Nurse - [Your Name]"

title: Ad Creative Designer
description:
Remote Ad Creative Designer – 15-Second Animated Ads



Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

Type: Contract / Per-Project (Ongoing Work)



Overview



I’m looking for a skilled creative designer to produce 15-second animated ads for local businesses for my advertising company, Archer’s Mark Media.



These ads run on TV screens inside restaurants, diners, and waiting rooms. You’ll be given basic business information, a logo, and client feedback, and you’ll be expected to create a clean, professional, visually appealing ad without relying on pre-made templates.



This role requires good creative judgment, not just technical execution.



What You’ll Be Creating



15-second animated ads for local businesses



Original layouts and visual concepts



Motion graphics suitable for TV display



Ads that clearly communicate:



Business name



Location



Products or services



Call to action



Each client is different, so creativity and adaptability matter.



Responsibilities



Design original 15-second animated ads based on limited input



Interpret basic client feedback and apply revisions



Ensure ads are clear, readable, and visually strong on TV screens



Deliver final ads in required formats and resolutions



Maintain consistent quality across multiple clients



Required Skills & Tools



Strong Canva skills or other design tools capable of animation



Experience creating short animated ads or motion graphics



Good visual hierarchy and typography skills



Ability to design without templates or step-by-step instructions



Strong attention to detail



Ability to take feedback and revise efficiently



Ideal Candidate



Confident creating designs from scratch



Understands what makes an ad visually effective



Can make creative decisions independently



Reliable with deadlines



Communicates clearly and professionally



Comfortable working project-by-project



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys turning minimal information into polished creative work.



Work Structure & Pay



Paid per ad or per project (please include your rate)



Ongoing work available for the right person



Clear briefs provided, but creative execution is up to you



No client communication or sales responsibilities



How to Apply



Please include:



A short introduction



Your experience with animated ads or motion graphics



A link to 2–5 examples of ads or animated designs you created



Your preferred rate (per ad or per hour)



Include the phrase “CREATIVE WITHOUT TEMPLATES” at the top of your application.

title: AI AD CREATOR FOR 7-FIGURE ECOMMERCE BUSINESS
description:
We are a fast-growing international eCommerce company looking for an AI Ad Generation Creator who understands marketing, not just AI tools.



Your role is to use AI tools + strong marketing knowledge to create high-converting, scroll-stopping ads for our products.

This is NOT just prompting. We need someone who understands what makes ads convert.



What You’ll Be Doing:

- Use AI tools to generate ad creatives.

- Create high-converting image & video ads based on marketing psychology.

- Apply marketing frameworks to create strong hooks, angles, and offers.

- Identify good vs bad swipe.

- Improve creatives based on performance feedback.

- Generate multiple variations for creative testing.



You MUST Understand:

- What makes a good ad vs bad ad.

- What makes a strong hook.

- What is good swipe vs weak swipe.

- Basic marketing principles 

- Conversion-focused thinking (not just “pretty design”).



Requirements:

- Knowledge of marketing & advertising psychology.

- Experience creating ads for eCommerce / dropshipping.

- Detail-oriented and highly organized.

- Able to work independently and test different angles.

title: Customer Service Agent – Short Term Rental Specialist
description:
Perfect Booking Ltd | UK-Based | Full Time | Remote Role (Philippines)



Perfect Booking is a growing UK based short-term rental management company in a period of rapid growth. We manage a portfolio of high performing properties and operate at a high standard. Guest experience and review protection are everything to us.



We are now looking for an experienced Customer Service Agent who understands the short term rental industry properly. Not someone learning from scratch.



This role is for someone who has already worked in Airbnb or serviced accommodation, ideally as an Airbnb Superhost Support Agent or within a professional property management company.



About The Role



As a CSA, you will be the first line of communication between our guests and our company. Your job is not just to reply to messages. It is to protect our reviews, resolve issues calmly and keep operations running smoothly.



Guests will message about heating not working, WiFi issues, maintenance problems, early check-ins, complaints about cleanliness, noise issues and everything in between. You must be confident handling these situations without escalating unnecessarily.



We are looking for someone who can think logically, troubleshoot properly and de-escalate emotionally charged situations. You should understand that how something is said often matters more than what is said.



You will also work closely with our operations team, cleaners and maintenance contractors. When issues arise, you will assess urgency, gather the correct information and take the appropriate action.



This role requires maturity, strong written and spoken English and the ability to stay calm under pressure.



Experience We’re Ideally Looking For:



- We would strongly prefer someone who has:

- Worked directly in the short term rental industry

- Experience supporting Airbnb and other OTA guests

- Ideally worked as an Airbnb Superhost support agent

- Experience handling high volumes of guest communication

- Managed bookings on Airbnb, 
 or VRBO



Experience using the following systems would be highly beneficial:



Guesty

Pricelabs

Turno

ClickUp

SuiteOp



If you have used similar systems, that is also fine, but you must understand how a professional STR operation runs.

The Type of Person Who Will Succeed Here



We have and are building a serious company. This is not a passive VA role.



You will succeed here if you:



- Take ownership of problems rather than passing them on

- Think before escalating

- Care about protecting 5 star reviews

- Have a strong work ethic

- Want to grow with a scaling business

- Can support a team environment



As we grow, there will be opportunities for increased responsibility 



Working Hours

Please state clearly your availability in GMT.



Shifts available are (GMT):



8am - 4pm

3pm - 11pm



We operate 7 days a week, so flexibility is important.



To be considered please:



- Record a 1 minute Introduction video of yourself, outlining your current experience and why you think you would be our next perfect hire

- Upload your CV



A google drive link for this would be good or any way you'd like



I look forward to reviewing your application



Thanks

Ollie

Founder

title: Marketing and Social Media Manager
description:
Marketing and Social Media Manager

Remote | Part Time

Starting at 550 USD per month plus performance incentives



We are looking for a strategic Marketing and Social Media Manager who does not just post content but builds brand presence and drives real business results.



Our client operates in the AV and IT integration space, delivering advanced technology solutions across unified communications, digital signage, and network infrastructure. This is your chance to translate complex technical solutions into compelling stories that generate leads and position the company as an industry authority.

Google Maps • LinkedIn • Business Research

We are a growing digital marketing company looking for a Lead Generation Research Specialist who can find qualified business leads for outreach campaigns.



Your main responsibility will be researching and building lists of business owners and decision makers in specific industries.



These leads will later be used for
 outreach and social media contact.



This is not a basic data entry role. We are looking for someone who understands how to find high-quality business leads, not just random companies.



This position begins part-time, with the potential to become long-term work for the right person.



What You Will Be Doing

Yoga studios

Boutique fitness studios

Wellness businesses

Business directories

Website

Owner or Decision Maker, if available

 if available

Instagram or
 page

Important!!!



We are not looking for thousands of random businesses.



We are looking for high-quality leads that match specific criteria.



Accuracy is more important than volume.



Requirements



Strong research skills

Good English communication

Experience with lead generation or online research

Attention to detail

Reliable internet connection



Bonus if you have experience with:

Lead generation tools

Digital marketing agencies



Work Structure

Consistency

Communication

Introduction

Internet Speed

Please find 3 boutique fitness studios in the United States and provide:



Business Name

City and State

Website

Instagram page



Bonus if you can find the owner's name or
.

title: Amazon Account Executive
description:
We are looking for a Philippines-based Amazon Account Executive to help manage and grow our portfolio of Amazon brands.



You will be responsible for the day-to-day health and growth of our accounts from optimizing listings and monitoring performance, to coordinating with our team and using data (and AI tools) to make smart strategic decisions.



You’ll be working closely with the leadership team and other specialists, with the opportunity to contribute ideas, not just execute instructions.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES :

1. Monitor and optimize Amazon accounts (listings, inventory, pricing, customer experience).

2. Conduct ongoing market and competitor research to identify trends and growth opportunities.

3. Use AI tools and data analytics to improve performance (traffic, conversion, profit).

4. Execute keyword research, listing updates, A/B tests, and promotions.

5. Oversee account and listing health, proactively resolving issues such as suppressions, policy warnings, and performance notifications.

6. Coordinate with internal and external tea
mbers to ensure smooth implementation of strategies.

7. Prepare regular performance reports with clear insights and action steps.

8. Support new product launches and brand-building initiatives on Amazon.



QUALIFICATIONS : 

1. Proven experience managing and growing Amazon Seller Central and/or Vendor Central accounts

2. Strong understanding of Amazon best practices (SEO, listing optimization, reviews, account health, basic PPC fundamentals).

3. Comfortable using data and tools.

4. Experience with tools like Helium 10, Jungle Scout, DataDive, or similar

5. Experience documenting processes and building simple SOPs.



ENGAGEMENT TERMS : 

1. We are specifically looking for someone who wants a long-term role and is committed to growing with the company. The role will start with part-time probationary period and has a strong chance to grow into a full time role complete with Paid Time Off and HMO.

2. Work is remote, with a flexible schedule, but you should be available for some overlap with our team’s working hours for meetings and collaboration.



IMPORTANT REMINDER :

1. We are not looking for agencies. We want to work directly with an individual professional.

2. If you qualify for the first screening, there would be a practical exam that you need to answer.

title: Production & AR Specialist- Roofing
description:
Offer

Standard Legal Philippine Employment

43,000 basic salary + all Government mandated benefits

Various company initiated incentive programs

Division bonuses 



About the Role:

We are seeking a highly detail-oriented, process-driven, and resourceful professional to support our production operations in the roofing industry.



This role plays a critical part in ensuring projects move from contract to completion without costly delays, compliance issues, or revenue gaps. You will be responsible for material ordering, work orders, roof drawings, inspection scheduling, permit verification and processing, and accounts receivable follow-up, particularly insurance-related collections.



This position requires laser-sharp attention to detail. A single oversight, such as failing to secure a required permit, can result in fines, penalties, or project delays. Accuracy, ownership, and consistent follow-through are absolutely essential.



If you thrive in structured processes, enjoy verifying information thoroughly, and take pride in operational excellence, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Production Coordination

Create and manage work orders for roofing projects

Order materials accurately and on time based on project specifications

Coordinate with suppliers to confirm availability and delivery schedules

Prepare and review roof drawings and measurements (EagleView, Hover, or similar tools preferred)

Schedule city and final inspections

Maintain accurate production timelines and internal documentation

Communicate with project managers and field teams to ensure alignment



2. Permitting & Compliance

Identify whether permits are required for each project

Contact city offices or municipal departments to verify requirements

Submit and process permit applications accurately

Track permit approvals and inspection schedules

Maintain documentation for compliance records

Ensure no project begins without required approvals

Monitor changes in city requirements and update internal processes



Note: Failure to secure required permits can result in fines or fees — this role demands precision and accountability.



3. Accounts Receivable & Insurance Follow-Up

Track all outstanding balances for roofing projects

Follow up with insurance companies to ensure depreciation checks are released on time

Monitor claim status and document communications

Contact homeowners regarding payment schedules

Follow proper cadence for collections on insurance jobs

Maintain detailed and organized tracking systems

Coordinate with internal accounting team to reconcile payments

Escalate payment delays appropriately



4. Communication & Cross-Department Coordination

Communicate clearly with:

- Insurance adjusters

- City permit offices

- Suppliers

- Homeowners

- Project managers

- Accounts team

Provide accurate updates internally and externally

Escalate potential compliance or payment risks early

Maintain professionalism when discussing collections



Requirements:

Experience in roofing, construction operations, or production coordination

Strong understanding of permit processes (city-level preferred)

Experience handling accounts receivable or collections

Familiarity with insurance claim processes (especially depreciation recovery)

Exceptional attention to detail and documentation accuracy

Highly organized and process-oriented

Strong follow-up discipline, nothing falls through the cracks

Confident and professional phone communication skills

Ability to verify information independently (resourceful and proactive)

Comfortable tracking multiple projects simultaneously



Preferred:

Experience in the roofing industry (highly preferred)

Familiarity with homeowner’s  insurance restoration jobs

Experience working with U.S. municipalities (if applicable)

Knowledge of CRM systems and production tracking software

Experience using roof measurement tools (EagleView, Hover, etc.)

Basic understanding of construction timelines and workflows



What Success Looks Like:

Zero missed permits

No compliance-related fines or preventable delays

Materials ordered accurately and on schedule

Inspections scheduled without bottlenecks

Consistent and documented insurance follow-up

Timely release of depreciation checks

Minimal outstanding receivables beyond expected timelines

Clear, organized tracking systems

Strong internal communication with production and accounting teams

Homeowners feel informed and professionally handled





Interested applicants please fill out application form:

title: Appointment Setter & Client Success Specialist
description:
Offer

Standard Legal Philippine Employment

36,500 basic salary + all Government mandated benefits

Various company initiated incentive programs

Division bonuses 



About the Role:



We are looking for a confident, detail-oriented, and customer-focused professional to join our team as an Appointment Setter & Client Success Specialist in the roofing industry.



This role plays a critical part in both the front-end sales pipeline (setting qualified appointments and managing MRP files with precision) and the post-sale customer journey (ensuring a smooth transition from “Sale” to “Production”).



You will be the bridge between homeowners and our internal teams, guiding clients step-by-step through their roofing project while delivering world-class customer service. This role requires strong communication skills, adaptability, composure under pressure, and the ability to build genuine connections over the phone.



If you thrive in structured processes but can think on your feet, stay calm when you don’t immediately have the answer, and take pride in delivering exceptional customer experiences, this role is for you.





Key Responsibilities:

1. Appointment Setting & MRP Management

Manage and update MRP files with extreme accuracy and attention to detail

- Material ordering

- Delivery schedules

- Project start dates

- Supervisors

- Homeowners

Preferred:

- Experience working with US roofing contractors

- Ability to work US business hours



What Success Looks Like:

- Clean, accurate estimates submitted on time

- Minimal carrier pushback

- High supplement capture without unnecessary friction

- Clear documentation that supports scope and pricing

- Smooth coordination between estimating and production

title: Head of Procurement & Fleet
description:
SBFM are a Facilities Management business operating in the UK. We are looking for an experienced Head of Procurement and Fleet to join our business!



You will be responsible for developing and executing the procurement and fleet management strategy, ensuring cost efficiency, supplier performance and compliance with regulatory standards. This role will involve overseeing the procurement of goods and services, managing supplier relationships and optimising fleet operations to support our business objectives.



This position is offered on a full time basis, working Monday to Friday, 37.5 hours per week. 

 

Duties and Responsibilities:

- Develop and implement procurement strategies that drive cost savings and operational efficiency.

- Manage supplier selection, negotiation, and contract management to ensure quality, cost-effectiveness, and timely delivery.

- Establish procurement policies and procedures to ensure compliance with company and regulatory standards.

- Conduct market analysis to identify trends, risks, and opportunities within the supply chain.

- Work closely with internal stakeholders to understand business needs and ensure procurement aligns with company objectives.

- Drive sustainability and ethical sourcing initiatives within procurement processes.

- Develop and implement an effective fleet strategy to optimise vehicle utilisation and reduce operational costs.

- Oversee the procurement, maintenance, and disposal of company vehicles in line with business requirements.

- Ensure compliance with legal, safety, and environmental regulations related to fleet operations.

- Implement cost control measures, including fuel management, leasing strategies, and insurance negotiations.

- Utilise fleet management software and analytics to monitor performance, efficiency, and maintenance schedules.

- Develop and enforce policies for driver safety, training, and vehicle usage.



Qualifications and Skills:

- Degree in Procurement and Supply Chain Management and/or CIPS (Chartered Institute of Procurement & Supply) qualification is highly desirable.

- Proven experience in procurement and fleet management, preferably in the Facilities Management industry.

- Strong negotiation and contract management skills.

- In-depth understanding of supply chain management principles.

- Experience managing supplier relationships and performance metrics.

- Knowledge of fleet operations, including vehicle leasing, maintenance, and compliance.

- Strong financial acumen with experience in budgeting and cost control.

- Excellent leadership and stakeholder management skills.

- Proficiency in procurement and fleet management software.

title: EA & Ops support
description:
EA & Ops Support



About the Role



We’re looking for a highly organised, detail-oriented EA & Ops Support to join Ventures Together — a fast-growing angel investor community.



This role sits at the intersection of operations, investor experience, and deal execution. You’ll be the operational backbone supporting deal closing, finance admin, member experience, and light executive support across three partners.



This is ideal for someone with a strong Executive Assistant or Operations background who thrives in fast-moving, high-trust environments and takes pride in precision.



Key Responsibilities



Deal Closing Support



- You’ll play a hands-on role in supporting investments from close through lifecycle.

- Share certificate creation

- Communication to investee companies along the deal lifecycle

- Confirming follow-on opportunities and sending communications to investors



Finance Admin Support



- Working alongside our accountants and partners to keep financial operations clean and accurate.

- Receipts administration

- Providing monthly bank statements to accountants

- Bank and payment administration

- Setting up payments



Investor Support



- Ensuring members receive timely, professional and thoughtful support.

- Timely responses to investor queries

- Membership renewals and reminder communications

- New member onboarding support



Events Support



- Supporting our in-person and virtual events that drive community engagement.

- Setting up event pages

- Light event management support



EA Support



- Providing light executive support across three partners.

- Ad-hoc diary and scheduling support

- Inbox triage where required

- Coordinating internal and external meetings

- Travel booking if needed

- General administrative support



What We’re Looking For



- 3+ years experience as an Executive Assistant, Operations Associate, or similar role

- Exceptional written and spoken English

- Strong attention to detail — especially with financial and legal documentation

- Comfortable handling sensitive information

- High ownership mindset — you don’t wait to be told twice

- Confident working independently in a remote environment

- Tech-savvy (Google Workspace, Notion, Airtable, Slack, etc.)

- Experience in startups, tech, finance, venture, or investment environments is highly desirable.



What Success Looks Like



- Deals close smoothly and documentation is accurate

- Investors receive fast, clear communication

- Financial admin is clean and proactive

- Partners feel supported and unblocked

- Events run smoothly with minimal oversight



To apply, please take a free typing test online, and send through the screenshot of your results in your first message.

title: Deals EA
description:
Deals EA & Ops Support





About the Role



We’re looking for a highly responsive, detail-obsessed Deals EA to support our Head of Deals and manage our inbound dealflow.



This role sits at the very front of our investment pipeline. You’ll be responsible for ensuring every inbound opportunity is logged, responded to, triaged and tracked properly.



Over time, this role has scope to develop real judgment — learning how we assess deals and eventually making first-pass decisions independently.



This is ideal for someone who thrives in fast-paced environments, writes beautifully clear
s, and takes pride in keeping systems immaculate.



Key Responsibilities



Inbox Management



- Full inbox management for Head of Deals

- Inbox management for our generic dealflow inbox

- Drafting friendly, warm, professional responses to founders

- Flagging priority or high-potential opportunities

- Coordinating follow-ups and ensuring nothing slips



Dealflow Administration



- Adding inbound deals to our Airtable pipeline (from
, WhatsApp and other sources)

- Keeping Airtable clean, organised and up to date

- Sending follow-up
s where appropriate to move deals forward

- Ensuring each deal is at the correct stage within the pipeline

- Maintaining tidy records and consistent tagging



Research & Data Collection



- Desktop research to collect missing information

- Founder LinkedIn profiles

- Company background



Pipeline Support & Judgment Development



- Tracking deal progress and nudging internal follow-ups

- Learning our investment criteria and screening framework

- Gradually taking on first-pass filtering of opportunities

- Developing the ability to decline clearly unsuitable deals independently (with training and feedback)

title: Video Editor - Please read full post
description:
Wanted: "A-Player" Video Editor to Conquer the Internet

We are looking for "A Players" and killers on a mission to conquer the internet. Our mission is to produce clean, precise, and exceptional content that reinforces message and brand. We are in this game to be the best, we are here to change people's lives, and we want to make Eric globally famous.



If you are a dedicated editor who thrives in a brutally competitive landscape, this is your opportunity. Laziness and underperformance will result in immediate removal from the team. Slacking is a sin.



The Role & Daily Expectations

You will be the creative force behind main social media pages. Your goal is to maximize the potential of every video and serve the core message.



Daily Output: You must deliver a minimum of 1 exceptional video per day.



Speed & Efficiency: Videos should not take more than 2 hours to create; if they do, you must optimize your workflow.



Content Pillars: You will craft videos centered around topics like Business/entrepreneurship, Sobriety, Real Estate, Mindset, and Mental toughness.



Accountability: You must submit an End of Day (EOD) report daily detailing what you accomplished, what you struggled with, what you succeeded at, and a track of your time.



Strict Editing Standards

There is zero tolerance for spelling or sync errors. All editorial decisions must maintain brand consistency.



Visuals: Position head 1/3 above the middle of the screen and ensure every video uses face tracking to hold attention.



The Hook: The first 3 seconds are the most important part; you must select the best 3 seconds of the clip to create curiosity and frame the video.



B-Roll: Sync B-rolls to the beat for a cleaner feel and ensure B-roll footage showcases aspirational lifestyle.



Audio: Music must align with  brand, featuring a Hip-hop, edgy, or "Gangster" vibe.



Subtitles: Subtitles must be placed just under chin, formatted as one-liners with no more than 3 words at a time, and accurately synced to his lips.



Compensation & Bonus Structure

We want to reward your exceptionalism, precision, and speed. You are competing not just against the internet, but internally to secure the most money weekly and monthly.



Base Pay: $500 for at least 1 exceptional short a day.



Performance Bonuses:

View Milestone

Bonus Payout

Most views in a week

$50



Most views in a month

$200



100k views

$25



250k views

$50



500k views

$75



750k views

$100



1M views

$150





May the best win!

mber who will brief you on each task. Final content must be sent for approval before posting.

title: Product Researcher – Fashion Niche (US Market) – 35 Products per Week
description:
We are looking for an experienced dropshipping product researcher in the fashion niche.



Our focus is the American market. We are not looking for someone who sends random AliExpress listings. We want structured, data driven research based on clear criteria.



Your job is to find 35 qualified products per week that meet our testing standards.



This is not beginner work. You must understand what makes a fashion product scalable in paid ads.



???? Your Responsibilities



• Research 35 test ready products per week

• Focus on US market demand

• Validate products using clear data signals

• Provide structured reports in Google Sheets

• Include competitor links and proof of active advertising

• Explain briefly why each product qualifies



???? What We Expect From You



You must have experience with:



•
 Ad Library research

• TikTok ad research

• Competitor store analysis

• Google Trends

• Basic understanding of margins and AOV

• Identifying problem solving or strong desire based products



You must understand:



• What makes a product suitable for paid traffic

• Why some fashion products scale and others fail

• How to evaluate saturation properly



???? This Is NOT For You If



• You copy products from generic “winning product” lists

• You cannot explain your research strategy

• You only search AliExpress best sellers

• You do not understand US consumer psychology



???? Position Details



• Target output: 35 qualified products per week

• Long term opportunity

• Performance based bonuses for products that scale

• Weekly reporting structure



???? IMPORTANT – To Apply



To be considered, answer the following questions carefully.



Low effort applications will be ignored.



???? Initial Screening Questions



Describe your exact product research process step by step.

From idea generation to final validation. Be specific.



When researching fashion products for the US market, what signals tell you a product has scaling potential?



How do you check if a product is oversaturated versus validated?



What tools do you use daily for research and why?



What minimum criteria must a product meet before you send it to a client?



Give one real example of a fashion product you found that scaled.

Why did it work?



How do you evaluate margins and price positioning in fashion?



If we reject 10 of your product suggestions, what would you adjust in your process?





At the top of your application, write the word “SCALER” and explain in 5 to 7 sentences what separates a 10k per month product from a 100k per month product in fashion dropshipping.



Anyone who does not follow this instruction is automatically rejected.

title: VSL (Video Sales Letter) EDITOR
description:
NOW HIRING: VSL (Video Sales Letter) EDITOR Frank Media — under Franklin Media Group

Setup: Remote | Work From Home | Output-Based Earning Potential: ?80,000 – ?125,000+/month



This isn't a regular editing job. This is a high-income skill position.

Frank Media is looking for a VSL Editor who knows how to use editing to sell. You'll be creating 1-hour Video Sales Letters — the kind of videos that keep viewers locked in from the first second to the last, and turn them into buyers.

If you understand pacing, persuasion, and visual storytelling — and you want to get paid well for it — keep reading.



THE PAY (let's get straight to it)

?20,000 per VSL (1-hour long video) 5,000 retention bonus per VSL if viewer retention hits our benchmark

Monthly earning potential: 4 VSLs/month = 80,000 (100,000 with retention bonus) 5 VSLs/month = 100,
,000 with retention bonus) 6+ VSLs/month = 120,000+ (?150,000+ with retention bonus)

No earning cap. The more you produce, the more you take home. You control your income.

THE ROLE

You'll be our frontline weapon in sales — except your tool isn't a script, it's a timeline. Every VSL you produce is designed to convert viewers into customers. That means every cut, every transition, every text overlay has a purpose.

Day-to-day, you'll work on full-length VSLs from script to final render — pacing the story, layering in graphics, B-roll, and kinetic text, and making sure retention stays high throughout the entire hour. You'll collaborate directly with the team on revisions and feedback, and you'll have clear SOPs to guide your workflow.



YOU'RE A FIT IF YOU…

Have strong long-form editing skills (you've edited 30-minute to 1-hour+ content before) ? Understand how editing affects viewer behavior — you don't just make things "look nice," you make people stay ? Are proficient in Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut, or similar ? Have a creative eye with obsessive attention to detail ? Can follow brand guidelines, take feedback, and maintain consistency across outputs ? Have your own editing setup and reliable internet ? Can commit to producing 4+ VSLs per month



BONUS POINTS (hindi required, pero malaking advantage)

May experience ka sa VSL, webinar, or direct response video editing ? You understand copywriting and persuasion — kahit basic level ? Alam mo kung paano mag-structure ng long-form content para hindi ma-bore yung viewer ? May motion graphics or kinetic typography skills ka



WHY THIS ROLE HITS DIFFERENT

 80K–125K+/month — hindi mo need ng 3 clients para maka-earn ng ganito, isang company lang  Performance = Pay — retention bonus rewards you for doing great work, not just fast work  Fully remote — bahay lang, walang commute, walang office politics  No cap on output — kung kaya mo mag-produce ng 6 VSLs a month, bayad ka ng 6  Structured workflow — may SOPs, may feedback system, hindi ka mag-guguess  You're joining a real company — Frank Media runs multiple brands and platforms reaching tens of thousands of people



HOW TO APPLY

Fill out our official application form: 







Include the following: Updated resume  Portfolio with long-form video samples (VSL, webinar, or 30min+ edits preferred)  Your availability to start

 Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

We review applications daily. Qualified applicants will be contacted for next steps.

About the Role: 

We are looking for an Experienced Elite Amazon Seller Central Account Brand Manager with an expert level knowledge in all things Amazon Seller Central.  Must have proven results increasing sales for existing asins and successful product launches.  We are looking for someone to take charge and help run our Amazon account by working on improving sales of current brands we manage.  You are to  grow, and care for the brands we sell and manage them as if it were your own.  We are an agency that acts as the seller for the brands we manage on Amazon and manage multiple brands in which that number grows monthly.



Key Responsibilities:



Product listing optimization

Create A/B Testing

Track and Improve Organic Rank

PPC Management

New Product Launches

Amazon Posts

Create Cases working with seller support

General Customer Service

Use of Flat Files for Listing changes

Work in Brand Registry

Fix Account Health Issues

Prepare Shipments

Log upcoming inventory ordered into our system

Inventory Management

Feedback Requests

Create Seller Sku’s

Repricing



Fix stranded Inventory

Working with our graphic designer on Image/A+ content

Working within our GSuite account

General project management





Qualifications:



A minimum of 3+ years of experience working in Amazon Seller Central.

Fluent speaking and writing of the English language (this includes good grammar!)  

Proven experience in sales, marketing, or a related field, with a focus on e-commerce.

Strong analytical skills, with the ability to interpret data and drive process improvements.

Self-starter with the ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, or a related field is advantageous.

Proficiency in Google Sheets/Google Drive.

Good understanding of Amazon’s Terms of Service/policies and their fluidity.

Must be able to problem-solve technical issues.

Candidates should know how to do tasks such as getting an asin out of hazmat, looking through Amazon business reports for clues on how to improve our account and then putting that information into action driving positive results. Expert in flat files, changing existing listings to drive more traffic and sales, working with seller support to troubleshoot issues and getting them resolved quickly and efficiently.





What We Offer:



Competitive salary with bonuses.

Opportunity to work remotely.

Career advancement opportunities in a growing e-commerce field.

Supportive and collaborative work culture.

Flexible work arrangements tailored to employee needs.

Take Action: We hire the best talent in the industry to be part of our team. If you feel you are up for a great challenge and fit the description above, we would like to hear from you.



Important:



Do not apply unless you can work full time.  You will be required to work a flexible 8+ hours during our working hours ranging from 6:00 am through 8:00 pm central time. This is a full-time position with very competitive pay and bonuses.  We have a proven track record of hiring and keeping our staff for the long term. title: Full-Charge Bookkeeper
description:
FULL-TIME NIGHT SHIFT | Remote | For High-Performance Professionals Only



US compnay seeking an exceptional Remote Accountant to join our specialized team providing advanced accounting services across the United States. This is a FULL-TIME, NIGHT SHIFT (8am- 5pm EST) position designed for seasoned professionals who thrive under pressure and deliver excellence consistently.



IMPORTANT: This is NOT a side job or flexible arrangement. We need dedicated professionals accustomed to night shift operations who can commit to full-time hours. If you're seeking part-time work or are uncomfortable with night schedules, please do not apply.



What Sets This Role Apart



- 5-day work week 

- Premium compensation for proven high performers

- Comprehensive benefits: Paid vacation/sick leave, extensive paid training,

- Complete autonomy in a remote environment - perfect for self-directed professionals

- Specialized focus on B2B



The Challenge - Are You Ready?



We need a financial data cleanup specialist who can handle:

- Granular-level financial data reconciliation across complex business structures (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, AR, Vendor Recon)

- High-pressure deadline management while maintaining 100??curacy

- Independent problem-solving of complex accounting discrepancies

- Proactive identification and resolution of financial irregularities

- Core Responsibilities for Elite Performers

- Execute comprehensive book-cleanup projects with tight deadlines

- Perform detailed adjusting entries with a deep understanding of tax implications

- Master QuickBooks Online for complex multi-entity structures

- Conduct advanced data analysis using Excel and Google Sheets

- Manage full-cycle AR/AP, invoicing, payroll, and bank reconciliations

- Deliver precise categorization and accounting across diverse business models



Non-Negotiable Requirements



- Proven track record in US accounting with demonstrable results

- Expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Online AND Desktop

- Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills for complex data manipulation

- Exceptional English communication - written and verbal

- Night shift availability - this is not flexible

- Autonomous work style - you must be self-directed and proactive





Who Should Apply



- Rock stars only. We want professionals who:

- Thrive in high-pressure, deadline-driven environments

- Work autonomously without constant supervision

- Have extensive experience cleaning up complex historical financial data

- Take ownership of results and deliver consistent excellence

- Are committed to full-time night shift operations



Who Should NOT Apply



- Those seeking part-time or flexible arrangements

- Professionals are uncomfortable with night shift schedules

- Anyone looking for a "side job" or supplemental income

- Those requiring extensive hand-holding or micromanagement

- Ready to prove you're among the elite?

title: COLD CALLER (APPOINTMENT SETTER)
description:
We are hiring an outbound cold caller to set appointments. We prefer overseas applicants, especially from the Philippines. We need someone reliable who can start very soon.

Schedule



Monday to Friday

8:00 AM to 4:00 PM EST

What you will do

Cold call business owners (outbound)

Make 300+ dials per day

Talk clearly and confidently

Build quick rapport

Set appointments and confirm details

Take notes and follow instructions

Requirements

You have real cold calling experience (not your first job)

Clear, neutral English accent

Comfortable speaking all day

Good communication and listening

Detail-oriented and coachable

Fast at replying to messages

Always on time

Pay (paid weekly)

Week 1 (training): $100

After training: $125/week ($500/month)

We are hiring fast

We want to fill this role in the next few business days. Only apply if you can start ASAP.

How to apply

Reply with:



A short message (5–10 lines) saying:

Your cold calling experience (what you sold + how long)

How many dials per day you’ve done before

Why you’re a good fit

A short voice recording introducing yourself (10–20 seconds) so we can hear your accent.

If you qualify, we will message you with next steps. Watch your inbox.

title: Startup Operations Project Manager (Business Launch & Growth)
description:
Startup Operations Project Manager (Business Launch & Growth) — FULL-TIME



Remote — Philippines Preferred | Full-Time | Start ASAP



We are building a new contact-centre & freelance staffing agency that connects global clients with skilled remote talent (VAs, EAs, analysts, developers, creatives, customer support & more).



We’re looking for a full-time Startup Operations Project Manager who can work directly with the founders to launch the business from scratch, establish scalable operations, and support long-term growth.



What You’ll Do

* Drive end-to-end business launch execution

* Establish core systems, workflows, SOPs, reporting & automation

* Organize legal, operational, compliance & business structure requirements

* Design and manage recruitment & onboarding pipelines

* Lead client onboarding & service delivery workflows

* Create and manage project plans, timelines, deliverables & dashboards

* Build repeatable, scalable processes that support growth

* Prepare client proposals, decks, job descriptions & operational documentation

* Support marketing & platform setup (website, funnels, systems)

* Coordinate with recruitment, dev, marketing & operations teams



Key Outcomes (First 90 Days)

* Business launch plan executed with clear structure & documentation

* Recruitment pipeline + onboarding workflow set up & running

* PM system, SOP library, and operational dashboards established

* Service delivery process ready for first client onboarding

* Clear operations roadmap for scaling to multiple clients & teams



 Who You Are

* Proven experience in project management + operations

* Background in startup environment, BPO, outsourcing, or freelance agency

* Strong experience managing remote teams & cross-functional tasks

* Exceptional organization, communication & problem-solving skills

* Able to build structure from scratch and work autonomously

* Strategic and hands-on — can plan and execute

* Thrives in fast-moving environments and figures things out



Advantage if you’ve used

ClickUp, 
, Notion, Asana, Trello, Slack, GChat, HubSpot, Zoho, Zapier, LinkedIn Recruiter, JobStreet, OnlineJobs.ph, GHL, CRMs, automation tools



Work Arrangement & Compensation

* Full-Time, remote role

* Flexible but structured hours (PH time zone overlap required)

* Competitive base salary

* Long-term role with growth into Operations Lead / Head of Ops as we scale

1?? Fill out the application form (remove spaces): https ://forms.gle/9bPC8mnQTHzL1vjPA

title: Senior Video Editor & Graphic Designer
description:
Senior Video Editor & Graphic Designer



High Performance Meta Ads Creative Specialist



We are looking for a high end Video Editor and Graphic Designer who understands that creative is the single biggest lever in paid media performance.



This is not a social media content role.

This is not a Canva template role.

This is not a CapCut editing role.



This is a performance driven creative role focused specifically on building high converting ads for Meta.



You will be pivotal in how we go to market for our clients. Your work will directly impact revenue, lead quality and client growth.



If you do not have advanced experience using Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator and the wider Adobe Suite, this is not the role for you.



If you have never created ads that have generated measurable results, this is not the role for you.



About The Role



You will be responsible for producing high converting ad creatives for Meta campaigns across multiple high value service based industries.



This includes:



• Direct response video ads

• Hook driven short form creatives

• Founder led talking head edits

• Performance driven static graphics

• Motion graphics for ads

• Split test creative variations

• UGC style ads with professional polish

• Thumbnail and scroll stopping graphic concepts



You will work closely with our strategists and media buyers to:



• Develop creative concepts aligned with campaign strategy

• Interpret performance data and iterate creatives

• Build multiple variations for testing

• Understand audience psychology and buying behaviour

• Align visuals with positioning and offer angles



Your creative will not just look good. It must convert.



This Role Is For You If



• You have proven experience editing high performance ads

• You understand direct response marketing principles

• You can create thumb stopping hooks within the first 3 seconds

• You think in terms of CTR, CPA and conversion rates

• You know how to structure ads for retention and engagement

• You can take raw footage and turn it into compelling sales driven assets

• You understand pacing, sound design and motion for performance

• You are detail obsessed and proud of your craft



Experience within the Australian market is strongly preferred. Understanding local tone, culture and compliance standards is important.



This Role Is NOT For You If



• You only know Canva or CapCut

• You rely on templates for most of your work

• You have only created organic social posts

• You do not understand paid media performance

• You cannot confidently use the Adobe Suite

• You have never worked on campaigns with real budgets and measurable KPIs



We are looking for someone who takes ownership and treats client creative like their own business.



What You Will Be Measured On



• Creative performance

• Ability to produce high quality assets consistently

• Speed of iteration and testing

• Contribution to campaign growth

• Collaboration with strategy and media buying teams



The Opportunity



You will play a direct role in scaling businesses. Your work will impact real revenue.



You will work with ambitious brands looking to grow, not small one off projects.



If you are someone who wants to build portfolio pieces that actually move numbers and not just look nice, this is for you.



If this sounds like you, send through:



• Your portfolio

• Examples of paid ads you have created

• Performance results where possible

• A short note on why you believe creative drives growth



If you only have Canva or CapCut experience, please do not apply.

title: Job Opening: Shopify Store Designer (With Coding & Dropshipping Experience)
description:
Who are we?



We are a fast-growing e-commerce company operating multiple Shopify-based stores across Europe and the US, generating consistent 7-figure monthly revenue. Our brands are scaling rapidly, and we are looking for a skilled Shopify Store Designer who can take our stores to the next level.



???? Your Role



As our Shopify Store Designer, you will be responsible for designing, building, optimizing, and maintaining high-converting Shopify stores. You must combine strong design skills with technical coding expertise and a deep understanding of dropshipping business models.



This is not just a design role — we are looking for someone who understands the full e-commerce funnel and can build stores that convert.



???? Responsibilities



Design and build high-converting Shopify stores from scratch



Customize themes using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Liquid



Optimize product pages, landing pages, and checkout flows for conversion



Implement upsells, bundles, and CRO elements



Ensure mobile-first, responsive design



Integrate apps and third-party tools correctly



Improve store speed and performance



Work closely with media buyers and product researchers to align store strategy



Understand dropshipping logistics and build stores accordingly



Maintain clear documentation and structured workflows



? You Are the Perfect Fit If You:



Have proven experience with Shopify (Shopify Admin, themes, apps)



Have strong coding skills (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Liquid)



Have experience building dropshipping stores



Understand product-page psychology and conversion optimization



Can work independently and take ownership



Are structured, detail-oriented, and proactive



Have experience with tools like PageFly, GemPages, Klaviyo, etc.



Can analyze what makes a winning product page convert



???? What We Offer



100% remote work setup



Competitive START salary of $400 with performance-based growth opportunities



Long-term collaboration with growth potential



A fast-paced, performance-driven environment



Freedom to take ownership and implement your ideas



Opportunity to scale multiple 7-figure stores



???? How to Apply



If you are experienced, structured, and ready to build high-performing Shopify stores, we would love to work with you.



To confirm that you have read the entire job post, please include the text “SD” in your application.



Best Regards,

FMYAA

title: Dropshipping Customer Service Virtual Assistant
description:
About the Role



We are seeking an experienced Customer Support Virtual Assistant to join our fast-growing dropshipping business. Candidates must have proven dropshipping experience (e.g., Shopify or similar platforms); without this background, your application will not be considered. You should also be highly competent in using translation tools to receive, manage, and send
s in various native EU languages. This role requires exceptional problem-solving skills, strong organizational abilities, and excellent written communication to ensure customer satisfaction and continuously improve internal processes.



Key Responsibilities



Inbox Management: Efficiently handle customer inquiries via
, ensuring timely and professional responses.



Multilingual Support: Manage communications in Dutch and other EU languages as needed.



Problem-Solving: Develop quick solutions to new issues that arise in the inbox and maintain a proactive approach to customer concerns.



Dispute & Chargeback Handling: Effectively process refunds, chargebacks, and disputes following the necessary procedures to minimize losses.



PayPal and Shopify/Whop Disputes: Confidently manage and respond to PayPal disputes, as well as Shopify/Whop-related disputes and claims, in line with platform procedures and deadlines.



Ticket Organization: Maintain and track customer inquiries using an Excel sheet to ensure smooth workflow and issue resolution.



High-Volume Management: Handle a large number of
s daily while maintaining accuracy, consistency, and a high standard of service.



Communication & Reporting: Identify challenges in the support process and proactively communicate them to management for improvement.



Process Improvement: Suggest and implement better ways to optimize customer service operations and contribute to the growth of the business.



Requirements



Mandatory Dropshipping Experience: Prior experience in dropshipping customer service is essential.



Multilingual Support: Utilize translation tools to manage communications in various native EU languages.



Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently.



Knowledge of chargebacks and dispute resolution processes.



Highly organized and capable of managing high
 volumes.



Proficient in using Excel for tracking and organizing customer tickets.



Excellent written communication skills.



Proactive and solution-oriented mindset.



Why Join Us?



Be part of a fast-growing eCommerce business with opportunities for growth.



Work remotely with flexible hours.



A supportive team that values innovation and initiative.



Benefit from genuine career progression opportunities based on your performance.



If you're passionate about eCommerce, thrive in customer service, and want to contribute to a growing business, we’d love to hear from you!



When applying, please include a short paragraph explaining why you think you'd be a great fit for this role.



To confirm you've read the full job description, please include the phrase “Inbox Ninja” somewhere in your application. Applications without this phrase will not be considered.



Please attach your CV with your application. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



AVAILABLE FOR IMMEDIATE START.

This is an opportunity to become a trusted technical advisor to clients while working in a structured, measurable, and growth-focused environment.



If you are organized, tech-savvy, customer-focused, and confident speaking both English and French — we want to meet you.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Technical & Customer Support

- Handle inbound calls and
s in both English and French

- Troubleshoot technical issues and guide customers to resolution

- Take full ownership of customer cases from start to finish

- Log all interactions accurately in our ticketing system

- Meet SLAs and quality standards while maintaining a professional, empathetic tone

 & Platform Support

- Assist with
 setup, password resets, forwarding, and troubleshooting

Campaign & Reporting Support

- Support post-campaign follow-ups

- Maintain accurate campaign data

Strong technical troubleshooting ability

Strong multitasking and organization skills

Ability to ask probing questions and identify root causes

Experience with ticketing systems or CRM tools

Experience with
 platforms or campaign tools
