title: Senior Software Engineer – Data Infrastructure
description:
40 hours per week

9 AM–12 PM CST (10pm to 1am PHT) for meetings and then remaining hours will be FLEXIBLE



About the Role

We’re building a modern education infrastructure that’s AI-powered, insight-driven and student-centered. As our Senior Software Engineer – Data Infrastructure, you will play a foundational role in scaling our data systems to support advanced analytics, automation, and machine learning across the entire student lifecycle.

This role is both deeply technical and cross-functional: You’ll own the pipelines, integrations and backend systems that power real-time dashboards, AI tools and predictive intelligence while also building internal front-end tools to help staff interact with data, AI outputs and operational automations. This role is ideal for someone who thrives on clean architecture, robust automation, and building systems that just work: securely, reliably and at scale.



What You’ll Do

Data Integration & Engineering

- Design, build and maintain robust, secure data pipelines that ingest data from multiple external systems (Pipedrive, Disco, Google Classroom, Typeform, and more)

- Ensure high reliability through error handling, retries, status monitoring and logging

- Automate extraction, transformation and loading (ETL/ELT) of structured and semi-structured data using Python and SQL

- Normalize and enrich data to support dashboards, predictive models and staff tools



Infrastructure & Reliability

- Implement and enforce role-based access control, IAM policies and audit logs to meet SOC 2 and FERPA standards

- Build and monitor health checks and alerts for pipeline failures, data lags and schema mismatches

- Optimize our warehouse structure for performance, scalability and modular reuse across analytics and AI

- Set up job orchestration and scheduling using tools like Airflow, Prefect or AWS-native alternatives (e.g. Step Functions, EventBridge + Lambda)



Front-End Engineering & Tooling

- Develop internal-facing tools for interacting with AI systems, reviewing model outputs, approving automation actions or viewing student timelines

- Build lightweight tools in React, TypeScript, and TailwindCSS or use Streamlit for admin panels or dashboards

- Design intuitive workflows for staff-facing tools, annotation interfaces or moderation views

- Connect front-ends to cloud platforms (AWS, Snowflake), REST APIs, and internal services with appropriate authentication



Cross-Functional Collaboration

- Work closely with the Head of Data & AI Engineering, data analyst and product teams to prioritize technical work that supports critical operations

- Translate ambiguous data needs into scalable backend solutions

- Participate in data model design to ensure analytical and operational use cases are both supported and future-proof



Who You Are

Technical Expertise

- 5+ years of software engineering experience with a strong focus on backend or data systems

- Proven experience building data pipelines with Python, SQL, and cloud-native infrastructure (AWS preferred)

- Fluency in working with APIs and handling authentication, rate limits, pagination and error retries

- Comfortable working in AWS, building scalable, event-driven workflows with Lambda, Step Functions, S3 and Secrets Manager

- Familiarity with CI/CD, Docker, Git and monitoring tools (e.g., CloudWatch, Sentry, Prometheus)

- Experience with React + TypeScript and/or Streamlit for building internal tools or dashboards

- Proficiency in Snowflake, or similar cloud data warehouse (BigQuery, Redshift, etc.)

- Strong understanding of data security, compliance, and auditability (IAM, encryption, access logs, etc.)

- Experience with job orchestration tools like Airflow, Prefect, Dagster or AWS-native scheduling approaches



Communication & Collaboration

- Communicates clearly and effectively with both technical and non-technical stakeholders

- Proactive about identifying blockers, surfacing risks and suggesting architecture improvements

- Able to document systems thoroughly for both internal use and compliance purposes

- Comfortable operating autonomously while staying aligned with the broader data strategy

- Committed to quality, documentation and building for long-term scale and auditability



Personal Attributes

- Systematic thinker: you take pride in designing durable, maintainable solutions

- Detail-oriented with a strong bias for clean, observable, production-ready systems

- Excited by mission-driven work and curious about how education, AI and automation intersect

- Comfortable working in a lean, remote, fast-moving environment



Success in This Role Looks Like

- You’ve built and deployed data pipelines that are reliable, fast and trusted by analysts, product teams and AI systems.

- The organization no longer waits on manual data pulls or ad hoc integrations - your work has enabled self-serve insights and model-ready data.

- Data pipelines are monitored, logged and compliant with best practices for privacy and security.

- Errors are rare and quickly recoverable, thanks to strong observability.

- Your infrastructure supports real-time student risk scoring, career automation and coaching dashboards - making it easier for every team to do their job better and faster.

- You are seen as a strategic partner who builds for the long term, not just the next task.



Why Join Us

- Build from the Ground Up: You’ll help design and scale the backend infrastructure that powers AI tools, dashboards and automations across our entire student journey.

- Tech with Purpose: Every pipeline you build and system you secure helps reduce student dropout risk, improve coaching quality, and streamline job placement - this is impact engineering.

- Autonomy with Clarity: Work in an environment who values clean architecture, fast iteration, and long-term durability and gives you the space to execute.

- Modern Tooling: Snowflake, Python, React, AWS, dbt, API integrations: bring your experience and help define the future of our data stack.

- Real Stakeholder Influence: Collaborate with cross-functional teams where engineering is not a service function but a strategic partner.

- Compliance & Scale: If you care about doing things right: IAM, auditability, observability, schema hygiene - this is the right home.

- Clear Docs, Clear Minds: We care about good documentation, thoughtful planning and building systems that last

- Remote-First and Human-Centered: We believe you do your best work when you’re supported, trusted and working on something meaningful.



About Coding Temple



Coding Temple exists to unlock potential.



We help people do the most meaningful work of their lives, and help companies build the teams that make that possible.

We prepare individuals with the skills, confidence, and real-world experience to succeed from day one. For employers, we deliver job-ready talent trained to meet the demands of modern work. Whether it’s a career change or a hiring challenge, we exist to close the gap between potential and opportunity—because when that happens, lives change and companies grow.



Our Vision

We envision a world where anyone, regardless of age, origin, or socioeconomic status, can achieve financial independence and professional fulfillment.



Our Mission

Our mission is to Empower Prosperity by delivering capabilities to professionals and organizations that drive economic growth.



We do this by creating a Virtuous Organization, a place where employees derive deep meaning from their work and gain increasing passion and energy from their colleagues, customers, students, and collective results. Together, we create an environment where each person can do their very best work.



Our core values guide us:

- Gratitude & Appreciation

- Dignity & Respect

- Support & Compassion

- Caring & Concern

- Meaningfulness & Purpose

- Inspiration & Positive Energy

- Forgiveness & Understanding

- Trust & Integrity



PS. Please don't apply if you have less than 5 years of experience. Thank you!

Please apply with your updated CV and include a cover letter summarizing your Python and SQL skills.

title: Experienced Cold Caller / Appointment Setter for Local Advertising
description:
About the Role



We are hiring 1 experienced appointment setter / cold caller to book qualified sales appointments for the founder of a growing local advertising network.



We place ads on TV screens inside popular venues such as restaurants, lounges, bars, and other high-traffic locations in City Island and New Rochelle. Businesses advertise with us because their message appears in front of captive local audiences who are actively watching the screens.



Your job is to call local businesses, speak with the owner or decision maker, create interest, and schedule a sales appointment.



This is not a generic call center job. We want someone who is strong on the phone, can create curiosity, and can book real appointments that show up.



Compensation



$5–$9 per hour, depending on experience



Bonus Structure



$15 per qualified appointment that shows up



Additional performance bonuses may be offered for strong, consistent results



Schedule



Monday to Friday



U.S. Eastern Time business hours



No weekends



Preferred: 6–7 hours per day



What You Will Be Selling



We offer advertising packages to local businesses that want more:



visibility



calls



appointments



walk-in traffic



local brand awareness



Package Types



You will be booking appointments for businesses that may fit into one of these two ranges:



1. Premium monthly packages:



$1,500–$2,500/month and higher



2. Standard monthly packages:



$999/month



You are not expected to close the sale or discuss full pricing details on the first call.

Your job is to create interest and book the appointment.



Target Business Types



You will be calling businesses such as:



Higher-priority recurring categories



Law firms



Auto dealerships



Med spas



Cosmetic-focused dental offices



Premium home services (HVAC, plumbing, roofing, water damage, electrical, etc.)



Faster-close categories



Auto body / collision shops



Insurance agencies



Mortgage brokers / loan officers



Select auto service businesses



What We Provide



We will provide:



lead list



call script



business overview



talking points



appointment booking process



support and direction



You must be able to take our pitch and deliver it in a natural, confident way.



Calling Style Required



This role requires a curiosity-based appointment setting style.



The call is not meant to sound pushy or scripted.



A typical opener is more like:



“Hi, I wanted to set a quick appointment to discuss advertising. We run the TV screens in Vistamar in City Island and other popular venues in City Island and New Rochelle, with captive audiences constantly watching the screens and engaged with the custom TV channels we’ve built for those venues.”



The goal is to make the decision maker curious and interested enough to take a short appointment.



You should be comfortable:



speaking with owners and decision makers



handling “what type of advertising?”



keeping the call moving



not pushing price too early



booking a real meeting



Responsibilities



Make outbound cold calls to local businesses



Reach the owner, partner, manager, or other decision maker



Briefly explain our advertising opportunity



Create interest and curiosity



Book qualified sales appointments



Log all call outcomes accurately



Send simple follow-up text or
 if needed



Help confirm appointments to improve show rate



What We Are Looking For

Required



At least 2 years of outbound cold calling or appointment setting experience



Strong spoken English



Clear voice and professional tone



Comfortable speaking with U.S. business owners



Strong follow-up and organization



Experience updating spreadsheets, CRM, or call logs



Stable internet connection



Quiet work environment



Good headset



Strong Plus



B2B appointment setting experience



Advertising or marketing-related calling experience



Experience calling law firms, dealerships, home services, medical/aesthetic offices, or similar businesses



Experience working U.S. hours



Experience booking appointments for higher-ticket services



Performance Expectations



This is a results-based role.



We will track:



calls made



conversations reached



decision-maker conversations



appointments booked



appointments that show up



We care most about qualified appointments that actually happen.



Who Should Apply



Apply if you are:



strong on the phone



comfortable with cold calling



confident but not aggressive



good at creating interest quickly



able to sound natural



serious about performance



Do not apply if you only have customer service experience and little or no cold calling experience.



How To Apply



To apply, send the following:



1) Intro



Include:



your full name



your location



your appointment setting / cold calling experience



the types of businesses you have called



your hourly pay expectation



2) Voice Recording



Send a 30–60 second voice recording reading this script naturally:



“Hi, I wanted to reach out because we run advertising on TV screens inside popular venues in City Island and New Rochelle, where local audiences are actively engaged with the screens. I’d like to set a quick appointment to see if this could make sense for your business.”



3) Your Results



Tell us:



how many appointments you usually book per week



what type of campaigns you worked on

title: US - Senior Accountant (Experience working in an Accounting Firm is REQUIRED)
description:

1-800 Accountant is America’s leading virtual accounting firm for small businesses. Our mission is to provide financial expertise to small businesses in every industry. Our services are powered by a mix of expert CPAs and technology, enabling businesses to minimize tasks while maximizing tax savings. This allows owners to focus their time and energy on growing their businesses while we handle the rest.



We are defining a new accounting services model to help business owners navigate the new economy. We combine technology with a dedicated accountant to serve the needs of start-ups, entrepreneurs, and small businesses by providing extraordinary service at an affordable price. Our team helps business owners focus on the passion they have for their business while helping them with their finances by creating a collaborative effort to help their business thrive.



Position overview:



Philippines

Remote

Senior Accountant



Please send an application using the link below.

wkf.ms/3ya3Kcb

Collaborating with other service lines to develop an integrated service package.

, Gusto, Ramp, and more

Experience in building and maintaining standard operations processes is a plus.

Experience managing a distributed team is a plus.



You Will Excel In This Role If You:

Are self-directed problem solvers and critical thinkers passionate about driving your clients’ success?

Have great attention to detail.

Are proactive and attuned to clients' needs, willing to take on various roles and ensure client satisfaction.

Demonstrate team spirit and strong communication skills, proactively engaging with your US counterpart and other tea
mbers and stepping in when needed.

Are eager to learn new things as you'll be exposed to many business models, concepts, and leadership styles.

title: Senior Software Developer (AI / Full Stack)
description:
About Us

We're a fast-moving team that builds high-quality software for the music industry and at speed. We don't do bureaucracy. We don't do "good enough." We ship excellent work, fast — and we're looking for someone who thrives in that kind of environment.

Trust is the foundation of how we work. We hire people we believe in, give them a vision, and expect them to deliver. If you need someone looking over your shoulder to stay productive, this isn't the role for you. If you love building things that matter and holding yourself to a high bar — keep reading.



The Role

We're hiring a Senior Software Developer with deep experience in AI, prompt engineering, and full stack development. You'll be building, shipping, and iterating on AI-powered products and tools. You won't just be writing code — you'll be shaping how our products think, respond, and perform.



This is a hands-on building role. You'll work across the full stack, integrate and fine-tune AI models, design effective prompts and training pipelines, and make architectural decisions that directly impact our product.



What You'll Do

- Design and build full stack applications end-to-end (frontend, backend, APIs, databases)

- Develop, test, and optimize AI-powered features using large language models

- Write effective prompts, build prompt chains, and engineer reliable AI workflows

- Create and manage training data, fine-tuning pipelines, and evaluation frameworks

- Make smart technical decisions quickly — we move fast and expect you to keep pace

- Own your work from idea through deployment and iteration

- Collaborate directly with leadership to turn ideas into shipped products



What We're Looking For

- 5+ years of professional software development experience

- Strong full stack skills — comfortable across frontend (React, Next.js, or similar), backend (Node.js, Python, or similar), and databases (SQL and NoSQL)

- Hands-on AI experience — you've built real products or features using LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, open-source models, etc.)

- Prompt engineering expertise — you understand how to design, test, and optimize prompts for production use cases

- AI training experience — familiarity with fine-tuning, RLHF, dataset curation, or model evaluation

- Speed without sacrificing quality — you write clean, maintainable code and you ship it fast

- Self-directed and reliable — you don't need to be managed. You see what needs to be done and you do it.

- Strong English communication skills — written and verbal



Bonus Points

- Experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or AI agents

- Background in DevOps or cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or similar)

- Open-source contributions or a portfolio of shipped AI projects

- Experience working in startups or high-velocity teams



Why Join Us

- Speed and trust. We hire great people and get out of their way. No micromanagement, no pointless meetings.

- High standards. You'll work alongside people who care deeply about quality and craftsmanship.

- Growth. AI is moving fast. You'll be at the center of it, building things that push boundaries and will increase your skills.



How to Apply

Send us your resume and include the following:



A 1-minute video introduction (REQUIRED). Record a short video where you introduce yourself, walk us through what you've built as a software engineer, and tell us why you believe you should be chosen for this role over everyone else. Keep it to 1 minute — this is a test of how clearly and concisely you communicate. Upload it to YouTube (unlisted), Google Drive, or Loom and include the link in your application.



A link to your portfolio, GitHub, or examples of your work.



A brief summary of your hands-on experience with AI/LLMs and prompt engineering — tell us what you actually built, not general statements.



Applications without a video will not be reviewed.



We read every application. If you're the right fit, you'll hear from us quickly.



- Taylor

title: Creative Strategist & AI Video / Static Ad Designer
description:
Creative Strategist & AI Video / Static Ad Designer



Type: Full-Time

About the Role

We are a fast-growing performance marketing agency managing 20–30 active clients and approximately $100,000 in monthly ad spend. Our clients are life insurance agents and agencies across the United States, and our entire business is built around one goal: generating high-quality, qualified appointments and leads. To do that at scale, we need world-class creative.

We are looking for a talented and driven Creative Strategist & AI Ad Designer to take full ownership of our creative output. This is not an entry-level position. The expectation is to produce 30–50 new ad creatives per week — a mix of AI-generated video ads and high-performing static image ads — that are strategic, on-brand, and built to convert. This role requires a high level of creative autonomy, speed, and a genuine obsession with what makes an ad stop the scroll and drive a qualified lead into a funnel.

Who You Are

*   A Proven Creative: You have a portfolio of video and static ad creatives — specifically performance-focused, direct response ads built to generate leads and book appointments. You know the difference between pretty and profitable.

*   An AI-Native Designer: You are fluent in the most current AI video and image generation stacks — tools like MaxFusion, Arc Ads, Veo 3, and similar cutting-edge platforms. You are not learning these tools. You are already using them in production, at volume, today.

*   A Direct Response Thinker: You understand lead generation and appointment funnel mechanics. You know how to engineer a hook, structure a visual narrative, and design a creative that moves someone from cold scroll to booked call — not just impressions and views.

*   Fast and Autonomous: You thrive in a high-output environment. You do not need to be micromanaged. You identify what is working, cut what is not, and keep pushing.

*   Collaborative: You work closely with our media buyers and account managers to align creative with campaign performance data and client goals.

What You Will Be Doing

High-Volume Creative Production: You will design, generate, and deliver 30–50 new ad creatives per week across all active client accounts. This includes AI-generated video ads (UGC-style, hook-driven, short-form) and static image ads (direct response, scroll-stopping, conversion-focused) — all built with the goal of driving leads and booked appointments.



Creative Strategy & Testing: You will develop creative concepts and testing frameworks, analyze what is working across the portfolio, and iterate rapidly to improve performance. You are not just executing — you are thinking strategically about why an ad drives a qualified lead into a funnel and what to do when it stops.



AI Tool Mastery: You will leverage the latest AI video and image generation tools — including MaxFusion, Arc Ads, Veo 3, and whatever comes next — to produce high-quality assets at a pace that would be impossible with traditional production methods. Staying current with the bleeding edge of AI creative tooling is a core part of this role.

Collaboration & Reporting: You will work directly with our media buyers to review creative performance data and align on priorities. You will meet regularly with the agency owner to discuss strategy, results, and the creative roadmap.



How to Apply



To be considered for this role, please submit the following:

Examples or a portfolio of AI video ads and static ad creatives you have personally produced.

title: Paid Media Specialist
description:
Paid Media Specialist (Search + Social) — Reporting + Optimization

Remote — Philippines 



Time Zone: Must overlap 4 hours/day with US Eastern Time (ET)



About SocialScience



SocialScience is a growth marketing agency managing paid search and paid social for high-growth brands across B2B and DTC. We specialize in performance-driven creative testing and media strategy designed to reduce CAC and scale revenue.



We’re hiring a Paid Media Specialist who can own performance + reporting across platforms.

This is not a virtual assistant role — this is a performance marketing role for someone who understands ad platforms, optimization, and how to turn numbers into clear next steps.



Role Overview



You’ll be responsible for two things:



Own the weekly reporting + insights engine across clients (clean, consistent, decision-ready data)



Support and execute campaign optimization (help scale winners, cut losers, and maintain clean account structure)



You’ll work closely with our media buying and strategy team. Over time, you’ll help strengthen cross-client insights, creative performance tracking, audit prep, and budget pacing systems.



What You Will Do

A) Reporting & Analytics (Core Responsibility)



Pull performance from:



Google Ads



Meta Ads Manager



LinkedIn Campaign Manager



TikTok Ads Manager



Google Analytics (GA4)



Update standardized reporting across all clients 3x per week (Mon/Wed/Fri)



Maintain clean, accurate master sheets and templates



Build and maintain pivot tables and summaries for:



CPA/CPL trends, CTR, CPC, CVR, ROAS



Creative performance and audience performance



Budget pacing by platform



Flag unusual performance shifts and highlight what likely caused them



B) Paid Media Support & Optimization



Assist with building and maintaining campaign structure for clean testing



Prepare data and insights before optimization sessions



Help turn off losers and scale winners using clear rules



Keep ad accounts organized and standardized (naming, budgets, structure)



Support weekly performance updates: spend, leads, CPL/CPA vs target, and next steps



C) Audit & Case Study Preparation



Pull last 60–90 days of structured data for audits and strategy reviews



Maintain “before vs after” performance snapshots for case studies



Organize campaign structure and performance notes for review



D) Creative & Audience Insights (Advanced / Growth Path)



Track top-performing creatives and audiences across accounts



Maintain a creative performance library



Spot repeatable patterns across clients that inform testing strategy



What Success Looks Like



Reporting is clean, consistent, and decision-ready every Mon/Wed/Fri



Media buyers have the numbers and insights they need before optimizations



Performance issues are flagged early (no surprises)



Accounts stay organized — no messy, fragmented structures



Tests are documented, learnings are clear, and next moves are always visible



Requirements



2–3+ years experience working inside paid ad platforms (agency or in-house)



Strong working knowledge of:



Meta Ads Manager + Google Ads (must-have)



LinkedIn Campaign Manager and/or TikTok Ads (strong plus)



GA4 (must-have)



Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills:



Pivot tables (required)



Formulas, data hygiene, structured reporting



Deep understanding of:



CPA/CPL, CPC, CTR, CVR, ROAS



Campaign ? Ad Set/Ad Group ? Ad structure



How to interpret performance signals and trends



Extremely detail-oriented and process-driven



Clear communicator in English (written + spoken)



Bonus Skills (Nice to Have)



Looker Studio / Data Studio



Supermetrics or data connectors



UTMs and tracking structure



Working Style Expectations



Daily check-ins (Slack/ClickUp)



Review accounts and data every working day



Hit deadlines without being chased



Flag issues early with proposed solutions



Comfortable managing multiple clients at once



90-Day Ramp



We’ll train you on our client avatars, offers, and internal systems.

Within 90 days, you should be confidently owning reporting + performance support, with clear weekly insights and strong account hygiene.



How to Apply



Send your application to: 



Include:



Resume + Portfolio (case studies or screenshots welcomed — blur sensitive info)



A short story: a significant event in your life that shaped you





See you!

title: Sales Customer Success Specialist
description:
Seeking a proactive and technically-savvy Sales and Customer Success Specialist. This is a freelance full-time remote position. You will be responsible for supporting the customer journey—from conducting the first product demonstration to successful platform implementation. You will play a key role in driving revenue by showcasing our software’s value to prospective clients and ensuring that new users are equipped to maximize the platform's potential.



Key Responsibilities

1. Product Demonstrations

- Conduct high-impact technical demonstrations of the FacilityBot platform to prospective B2B clients

- Translate complex software features into clear business benefits, addressing client's pain points



2. Customer Onboarding & Training

- Lead the onboarding process for new clients, guiding them through account setup, and initial configuration.

- Deliver user training sessions virtually for different stakeholders

- Create and maintain onboarding materials, video tutorials, and FAQ documentation where needed



3. Relationship Management & Success

- Collaborate with the technical support team to resolve deployment issues and provide feedback to the product team for future updates.

title: Facebook Ads Media Buyer
description:
We’re Not Hiring “Ad Experts.” We’re Hiring People Who Learn Fast and Execute Cleanly.

(PLEASE DO NOT REPLY DIRECTLY TO THIS POST. IF YOU WOULD LIKE TO APPLY, FOLLOW THE STEPS AT THE END.)



Pay: Negotiable flat rate per 2-week period (USD), based on experience

Pay Timing: Paid once every 2 weeks. 80 hours per period, agreed upon at hire

Location: Remote (Philippines-based applicants only)

Role Type: Full-time | Long-term

Openings: 5 Media Buyer roles

Team Scope: Executes media buying under the Lead Media Buyer and Ops system



Why This Role Exists

Meta Ads rewards discipline, not guessing.

At Black Hat Strategy, performance doesn’t come from hacks or shortcuts. It comes from interpreting signals correctly, following systems, and making fewer — better — decisions.



We’re hiring five Media Buyers to execute inside a proven framework. Prior ad experience is helpful, but not required. What matters more is your ability to think analytically, follow process, and learn quickly.



This role exists so:

Campaigns are managed consistently

Budgets are paced correctly

Creative tests are structured, not random

Performance changes are interpreted before actions are taken



This is not a “figure it out as you go” role.

This is a learn fast, execute clean role.



What You’ll Actually Be Doing

You will not be left guessing.

You will be trained and supported.



As a Media Buyer, you will:

Manage Meta ad accounts for ecommerce brands

Launch and maintain campaigns using predefined structures

Monitor performance signals and pacing daily

Make changes only when signals justify it

Document actions and observations inside ClickUp

Flag issues early instead of reacting late

Escalate when something truly feels off — not every dip

Structured check-in with the Lead Media Buyer (if applicable)



You are not expected to know everything on day one.

You are expected to learn quickly and follow the system.



What This Role Owns (From the SOP)

Day-to-day campaign execution

Budget pacing and spend stability

Structured creative testing

Signal observation and documentation

Following escalation rules exactly as written

ClickUp task hygiene and update consistency



If performance changes, this role:

Observes first

Interprets second

Acts third



This Role Is for Someone Who…

Comes from an analytical or data-driven background

(analytics, operations, finance, QA, engineering, reporting, etc.)

Learns new tools and systems quickly

Is comfortable working with numbers and patterns

Can follow processes without cutting corners

Documents their work clearly and consistently

Stays calm when results fluctuate

You don’t need to be a media buying “expert.”

You do need to be sharp, curious, and disciplined.



This Role Is Not for Someone Who…

Wants full creative or strategic freedom

Needs constant reassurance or hand-holding

Makes changes based on gut feelings

Struggles with structure or documentation

Dislikes feedback or process

How You’ll Work With the Team

Operating Cadence & Communication

Lead Media Buyer sets standards… you execute within them

Escalation & Recovery Lead diagnoses issues… you provide clean inputs and context

Project Manager ensures flow… you keep your work visible and documented

Ops Head sets direction… you stay aligned and consistent



You are not operating alone.

You are part of a system.



Why You’ll Like Working Here

Clear training and expectations

Supportive learning environment

No chaos, no guessing

Leadership that values thinking and precision

Long-term role with growth into senior buying or leadership



We don’t reward noise.

We reward good judgment.



Application Process

PLEASE DO NOT JUST REPLY TO THIS POST ON THE JOB BOARD.

To be considered, you must complete ALL STEPS BELOW.

The Google Form is your Online Interview.



Step 1: Take a short online IQ test

We respect intelligence and we think you probably do too.

Go to the Fast Learner Free IQ Test and complete it

Create a free account at the end

Save the results URL for Step 3

?? Applicants without a valid link will not be considered



Step 2: Record a 2–3 minute Loom video (camera ON)

Create a free account at Loom

Speak clearly in English

Tell us:

Your paid media experience

How you think about optimization and ROAS

How you’ve helped others improve performance

Save the Loom URL for Step 3



Step 3: Complete the Online Interview

NO AI ALLOWED. We want to hear you.

Open the Application Form

Enter your contact details

Paste:

IQ test results link

Loom video link

Answer all questions honestly and thoughtfully

Your answers matter more than perfect formatting.



Step 4: Live Video Interview (camera on)

This is where we get to know how you think.

I personally review every candidate who completes the steps above and will reach out directly to those who feel like the right fit.



If this role speaks to you, good.

That means you’re probably the kind of person we’re looking for.

Bring your best.

We’ll bring the system.



Link to Online Interview Form:

title: Part-time or Full-time Home-based ESL Tutor
description:
Longone, a leading provider of ESL education in China since 2017, is seeking dedicated and innovative educators to join our expanding team of home-based teachers. Due to strong and consistent student demand, our current teaching schedule is fully booked, and we are actively recruiting additional qualified teachers to meet this growing need.



1. About the Role

As an online tutor, you will conduct one-on-one English lessons with both children and adults in China. Depending on the number of classes booked, you can earn between 10,000 and 50,000 pesos per month. Outstanding performance may lead to further opportunities within the company.



2. Key Responsibilities

Deliver engaging and interactive English lessons.

Tailor lesson plans creatively to suit students’ needs.

Use effective teaching aids and techniques.

Foster a positive learning environment for both children and adults.



3. Compensation and Schedule

Competitive rates: 70–90 pesos per 25-minute class.

Flexible schedules available for both part-time and full-time positions.



4. Requirements

Bachelor’s degree (Education, Communication, or related fields preferred).

Excellent English communication skills.

Energetic and creative teaching style, with effective use of gestures.

NBI clearance.



5. Technical Requirements

Desktop or laptop computer.

Headset with microphone and noise-canceling feature.

Wired internet connection (minimum 5 Mbps).

Quiet, well-lit teaching environment.



6. Application Process

If you are interested in joining our team, please submit your application via Microsoft Teams (formerly known as
) by contacting us at
 ID: 
  If you are unable to locate the account using this number, you may alternatively search using the Teams ID:
We look forward to welcoming passionate educators to our team!

description:
Longone, a leading provider of ESL education in China since 2017, is seeking dedicated and innovative educators to join our expanding team of home-based teachers. Due to strong and consistent student demand, our current teaching schedule is fully booked, and we are actively recruiting additional qualified teachers to meet this growing need.



1. About the Role

As an online tutor, you will conduct one-on-one English lessons with both children and adults in China. Depending on the number of classes booked, you can earn between 10,000 and 50,000 pesos per month. Outstanding performance may lead to further opportunities within the company.



2. Key Responsibilities

Deliver engaging and interactive English lessons.

Tailor lesson plans creatively to suit students’ needs.

Use effective teaching aids and techniques.

Foster a positive learning environment for both children and adults.



3. Compensation and Schedule

Competitive rates: 70–90 pesos per 25-minute class.

Flexible schedules available for both part-time and full-time positions.



4. Requirements

Bachelor’s degree (Education, Communication, or related fields preferred).

Excellent English communication skills.

Energetic and creative teaching style, with effective use of gestures.

NBI clearance.



5. Technical Requirements

Desktop or laptop computer.

Headset with microphone and noise-canceling feature.

Wired internet connection (minimum 5 Mbps).

Quiet, well-lit teaching environment.



6. Application Process

If you are interested in joining our team, please submit your application via Microsoft Teams (formerly known as
) by contacting us at
 ID: 
  If you are unable to locate the account using this number, you may alternatively search using the Teams ID:
We look forward to welcoming passionate educators to our team!

title: B2C/B2B Web3 Customer Support Specialist
description:
B2C/B2B Web3 Customer Support Specialist

Full-Time

$600 / month

$800 after 3 months



About Us

Trustyfy is a global technology company building the first DeFi bank for companies and individuals.

For the first time since the invention of modern banking, customers, not banks, can have full ownership of their money.

Through our proprietary multi-signature and decentralized infrastructure, businesses can operate globally without payment delays and at a fraction of the cost of legacy banking systems. Workers can remit funds to their families with minimal fees, and billions of unbanked individuals gain access to financial independence.

We are not just building the future of finance. We are building technology that creates real-world impact.

Our vision is validated through strong recurring revenue and a successful seed round, and we are now scaling our global team to support the next phase of growth.

Why Your Role Matters

As a B2B Web3 Customer Support Specialist, you will help business clients confidently navigate crypto transactions and blockchain workflows. Your ability to combine excellent customer service with technical accuracy will ensure clients can securely send, receive, and verify digital funds while trusting Trustyfy’s infrastructure.

Key Responsibilities

Provide exceptional support to users and business clients via
, chat, and phone, ensuring prompt and accurate issue resolution.





Educate and guide users on interacting with decentralized applications (DApps) and using crypto wallets securely, including tools such as MetaMask.





Assist clients with sending, receiving, and verifying crypto transactions, including transaction validation using explorers such as Etherscan.





Troubleshoot issues related to blockchain networks, wallet integrations, and decentralized applications.





Collaborate with technical and product teams to escalate and resolve complex cases.





Maintain accurate records of customer interactions, technical concerns, and service recommendations.

Skills and Experience

Experience: Minimum of 2 years in customer service, technical support, or client success, ideally within fintech, Web3, or blockchain environments.





Technical Knowledge: Familiarity with crypto wallets, blockchain transactions, and DApps. Ability to quickly learn and adapt to new Web3 tools.





Customer Service Skills: Strong communication, empathy, and client-focused problem-solving abilities.





Communication Skills: Excellent written and verbal communication with the ability to simplify complex technical concepts.





Problem Solving: Strong troubleshooting and analytical thinking skills with high attention to detail.





Work Ethic: Highly reliable, self-motivated, and capable of working independently in a remote environment.





Availability:

Schedule Options: UK, US or AUS timezones

Must be open to working on weekends

40 hours per week, 5 working days



Salary

YOUR PAYMENT IS FIXED AND GUARANTEED. This means you will be paid even if workload temporarily fluctuates (although consistent workload is expected).



To apply for this position, please write in the subject line:

“I am a B2B Crypto Customer Support Specialist [Name + Surname]”

title: Long Term Digital Marketing Specialist (Dayshift)
description:
TITLE:

Digital Marketing Coordinator (aka Go High Level Expert)



BUSINESS:

Our business is a dream to work for…

• We provide content promotion and lead generation to global personalities and professionals.

• Our focus (and soon to be your focus) is to help global personalities and professionals succeed by driving attention to their most powerful educational content and drive leads to their business to increase their sales. To do this, we recruit the best video editors, graphic designers, content writers, paid ad media buyers and more.



ROLE:

This role is perfect for you, if…

• You are looking to work in a role of an experienced Digital Marketing Coordinator

• You want to work on multiple clients marketing campaigns, working with media buyers/graphic designers/video editors/content writers

• You have confidence and enjoy speaking professionally with clients (written and verbal)

• You want to work remotely, full time (40 hours) a week - Monday to Friday

• You’re interested in Day Shift hours, during Melbourne, Australia business hours

• You have a University Level Education

• And, you already have advanced skills in building (or running) paid digital advertising campaigns



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Your responsibilities will include…

• Build and execute comprehensive project plans for marketing campaigns

• Coordinate with internal and external delivery teams, including clients, graphic designers, content writers, video editors, content writers, media buyers and developers

• Enforce end-to-end message congruency from the ad creative, ad copy, landing page copy, resource, etc

• Define the #1 pain point being solved by the campaign and ensure it hits the desired target market

• Identify project issues, roadblocks or missing requirements quickly and resolve proactively

• If necessary, re-write and optimise content - such as; ad copy, funnel copy,
 copy, etc

• Ensure a campaign has the highest chance of success prior to going live

• Document and handover all campaign, funnel and ad resources to media buyer for them to manage post go-live

We will provide training on how to execute each item above, as long as you are the type of person who has the will to learn and master it.



REQUIREMENTS:

To be considered for this position, you are required to:

• You need to have a proven solid work experience as a digital marketing coordinator of at least 2+ years

• You need to have a Computer/Laptop with at least i5 processor and 8gb of RAM

• You need to have a 2nd computer screen in your home office

• You need to have a fast and reliable Internet connection, with access to a back-up

• You have leadership abilities, decision-making skills, and problem-solving capabilities.

• You have proven experience as a content writer in lead generation, or project manager in a lead generation, or operated in a digital marketing environment.

• You have a results-driven mindset with a commitment to achieving project objectives.

• You have a strong attention to detail and highly organised

• You have a friendly, upbeat and team focused attitude

• Most importantly, you desire to learn and obtain new responsibilities



SOFTWARE & TOOLS:

• Zoom - video meetings (internal team and client communication)

• Loom - screen recording software (internal team and client communication)

• Slack - internal communication tool

• ClickUp - task management software

• Google
 (gmail)

• Google Drive

• Google Sheets



How to Apply: Attach your CV link with your cover letter

title: Thumbnail Designer
description:
They would be **direct-impact thumbnails with instant readability**, built around these key elements:



* ???? **Very high-contrast colors** (red, yellow, black, and white).

* ???? **Huge, bold text**, very few words, clear message (“BREAKING”, “THE END”, etc.).

* ???? **One dominant face in close-up** with a serious or dramatic expression.

* ???? **Arrows or circles** to guide attention to a specific focal point.

* ???? **A secondary contextual image** (military scene, relevant background) to reinforce the topic.

* ???? Designed to be understood on mobile in under 2 seconds.

* ? No unnecessary elements or excessive text.



In short: **one strong face + one powerful scene + 3–6 giant words + aggressive contrast**. Simple, direct, and built for immediate clicks.



2-3 thumbnails per day.

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 1a
description:

/cro-shopify-web-developer/



CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education

title: Motion Graphics Artist
description:
*** Please read through the entire post before applying.  Thanks! ***



Company Description

Engage Video Production (EVP) creates educational and communication focused video content, primarily for aerospace, defense, and technical clients. Our work helps high stakes organizations explain complex ideas clearly, train teams effectively, and communicate with absolute precision. We operate with a military grade standard of excellence and are looking for a Motion Graphics Artist & Graphic Designer who is ready to grow within a high accountability environment.



The Three Pillars of Success at EVP

To succeed here, you must embody these three core values:



Discipline: You follow through on every task without "floundering" or ghosting. You possess the self-discipline to manage your time and meet deadlines without constant supervision.



Motivation and Dedication: You are dedicated to the mission and the company's growth. You don't just "do a job"; you look for ways to contribute to the overall success of the team.



Radical Integrity and Accountability: You own your mistakes immediately. You have the backbone to point out errors for correction, even if they are your own, because you understand that precision is non-negotiable.



*** Role Overview *** 

This is a dual-focus role. You will be the primary creator for our dedicated explainer and motion graphics videos, but you will also assist in the creation of graphic assets (when needed) for our standard video team. You will coordinate with our video editors to provide the graphic elements, overlays, and design assets that elevate every project we produce.

*** Core Responsibilities *** 

Motion Graphics Mastery: Lead the production of full-scale explainer videos, from storyboarding and asset creation to final animation.

Collaborative Design: Act as the internal design resource for our standard video editors. You will create the lower thirds, callouts, and technical diagrams they need for their edits.

Web & Digital Assets: Design high-fidelity web page elements and marketing collateral that align with our brand and our clients' technical standards.

Brand Consistency: Ensure a "Rising Tide" level of quality across all visual touchpoints, maintaining a clean, professional, and sophisticated aesthetic.



*** Must-Have Technical Skills*** 

Technical Stack: Proficiency in Adobe After Effects, Illustrator, and Photoshop - or similar graphical editing software.



Portfolio: A strong reel showcasing explainer videos and a portfolio of clean, functional graphic design (web elements, technical icons, etc.).



Leadership/Coordination: Ability to work alongside other editors, providing them with the assets they need to succeed on their timelines.



Communication: Exceptional English skills and a proactive communication style.



*** Compensation ***

Starting at: $350 (~20,000 PHP) to $600 (~34,500 PHP) USD per month, based on 20 hours/week, subject to change. 

Starting Rate: $4.00 to $7.00 USD per hour.  [*Conversions are approximate.]



Part-Time (20 hrs/week): $345 – $605 USD (~?19,500 – ?34,250 PHP) monthly.

Full-Time (40 hrs/week): $640 – $1,120 USD (~?36,800 – ?64,500 PHP) monthly.









Rate Determination: Starting salary/rates are dependent upon experience and demonstrated skill.



A Note on AI and Judgment

At EVP, we use advanced tools every day. However, this role requires high level human judgment and Radical Integrity. We are hiring a human, not a prompt. If you use AI to draft your personal responses in the “How to Apply” section, you are failing the first test of this role: Honesty. We want to hear your real thoughts and see your real personality to ensure you will be a good fit on our team. If your application lacks a unique human voice, it will be discarded. Use AI to assist your workflow later; do not use it to represent your character now.



*** How to Apply ***

To be considered, you must follow these steps exactly. Precision is a requirement for this role.



-Subject Line - change it to: "Technical Visual Artist – [Your Name]".



-Provide a link to your best motion and static design work. (No portfolio = no consideration).



-State the 10th word of our "Three Pillars" section.



-In exactly two sentences, describe a specific time you had to fix a mistake you made in a motion graphics project. Use plain English; no AI-generated fluff.



-Attach or link to your CV/resume.  Must be in PDF format only.



-Want to really stand out? Record a 60-second video (Loom or similar) introducing yourself. Tell me why you are the right pick and what about Aerospace & Defense interests you. Start the video by addressing me by name (Ryan). Applicants who include this video move to the top of the list.



Thanks for your time and genuine interest!

title: Remote Sales Consumer Advisor
description:
Company Overview

We are a US-based, remote-first consumer services business that helps clients resolve and exit unwanted long-term contracts. Our marketing engine is performing well, and we are expanding the sales team to increase close volume while maintaining a high-trust, consultative customer experience.



Role Summary

We are hiring two full-time Remote Sales Consumer Advisors to support a growing inbound lead flow. This is a closing role, not a cold-calling role. You will speak with primarily older, US-based prospects, educate them on the service, answer questions, guide them through the agreement live, collect required information, and then hand the client off to fulfillment.

This is a strong fit for someone who is confident on the phone, organized in a CRM, and comfortable handling sensitive conversations with clarity and empathy.



Work Hours

Full-time, 40 hours per week

US CST hours by default

Monthly performance bonus: tiered structure based on results

Bonus is tied to cash received, not just closed deals



Key Responsibilities

1) Phone Sales and Closing

Handle inbound and assigned leads, run consultative sales conversations

Build trust quickly with an older US demographic

Clearly explain the service, process, expectations, and next steps

Confidently ask for the sale, overcome objections, and close deals

Close within a typical cycle of same day to 14 days, including follow-ups as needed



2) Contract Review and Client Commitment

Walk clients through the agreement in real time on the call

Ensure clients understand what they are signing up for

Collect required details accurately to avoid downstream fulfillment issues





3) CRM and Lead Management (GoHighLevel)

Log all activity in the CRM with clean notes and accurate statuses

Follow the team’s lead management process to avoid missed follow-ups

Upload new clients into the CRM upon close, then hand off to fulfillment





4) Follow-up Discipline

Execute structured follow-up sequences to recover leads and close within the window

Stay responsive and organized across callbacks, scheduled follow-ups, and inbound replies





5) Performance and Continuous Improvement

Participate in daily quick check-ins during ramp (approx. 20 minutes)

Review performance metrics, identify breakdowns, and apply coaching fast

Contribute feedback to improve scripts, training docs, and call flow





Success Metrics

Contact rate and speed to first response

Show rate for scheduled calls

Close rate and close cycle length (0 to 14 days typical)

Revenue collected (used for bonus calculations)

CRM hygiene, no missed leads, accurate notes, consistent follow-ups

Call quality, clarity, trust-building, compliance with process



Required Skills and Experience

2+ years in phone-based sales, inside sales, or high-ticket closing preferred

Strong closing instincts, objection handling, and consultative communication

High comfort speaking with older US prospects

Strong CRM habits, preferably GoHighLevel (or similar CRMs)

Reliable internet, quiet workspace, professional headset setup

Coachable, consistent, and able to ramp quickly with daily feedback



Accent and Language Preferences

Strong preference for a neutral, easy-to-understand English accent

title: Executive Relationship Manager
description:
Company Overview

We support a high-end consulting and advisory firm that works directly with founders and executive teams at large, complex organizations. The business delivers strategic engagements around operations, culture, and leadership, typically serving companies in the hundreds of millions in revenue.

The firm is founder-led, relationship-driven, and known for deep, trusted advisory work rather than transactional consulting. The next phase of growth requires building a more repeatable, thoughtful sales motion without losing the personal, high-touch approach that defines the brand.



Role Overview

This is not a traditional sales or SDR role.

The Executive Relationship Manager works directly under Scott to support a small number of high-value client relationships and opportunities. The role exists to extend founder-led sales efforts, ensure warm opportunities are nurtured properly, and create continuity between marketing interest and executive-level sales conversations.

Success in this role comes from precision, discretion, and follow-through, not volume.

You will manage a limited number of carefully selected accounts, pay close attention to context and timing, and help move conversations forward in a way that feels personal, thoughtful, and aligned with senior executive expectations.

This role may support one primary client initially, with the opportunity to support a second similar client over time.



Core Responsibilities

Relationship Management & Follow-Up

Manage a small portfolio of high-priority target accounts

Maintain detailed context on relationships, prior conversations, and internal notes

Ensure warm opportunities never go cold due to lack of follow-up



Thoughtful Outreach & Communication

Draft and send highly personalized outreach
s or messages

Reference context, prior touchpoints, and known relationships

Communicate in a professional, discreet, executive-appropriate tone



Sales Support & Coordination

Prepare Scott with background and context before meetings

Handle post-meeting follow-up and next-step coordination

Keep 
ntum moving between conversations



Signal Tracking & Prioritization

Monitor warm signals such as website engagement, inbound interest, or referrals

Identify when outreach is timely and relevant

Surface priority opportunities to Scott with clear context



Systems & Organization

Keep CRM or tracking systems clean and accurate

Document relationship status and next actions clearly

Provide visibility into active conversations without unnecessary noise



Nice-to-Have / Expansion Responsibilities

These are not required on day one, but may become part of the role over time:

Provide feedback on messaging or conversion gaps based on conversations

Conduct light research on executives or target accounts

Support similar relationship-driven sales motions for an additional client

Participate in incentive or bounty structures tied to qualified meetings or closed deals



Ideal Candidate Profile

This role is a strong fit for someone who:

Has experience supporting senior leaders, executives, or high-touch clients

Comes from an executive assistant, consulting support, hospitality, PR, or client services background

Enjoys managing a small number of important relationships deeply

Is highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive

Communicates clearly and professionally in writing

Does not want a high-volume sales or cold outreach role

title: Recruiter
description:
This is a remote night shift position.



We are looking for a high-potential early-career professional who wants to build a serious career in Talent Acquisition.

This role is designed for someone ambitious, analytical, and tech-confident — not just someone looking for an HR job.

If you are naturally curious about people, enjoy evaluating patterns and behavior, and want to grow into a strategic recruiter, this is an opportunity to accelerate your career.

This is a performance-driven, growth-focused environment where initiative and thinking ability matter.



What You’ll Do

Support end-to-end recruitment processes with increasing ownership

Screen and assess candidates beyond resumes — evaluate behavior, thinking ability, and long-term fit

Identify red flags, strengths, and performance indicators

Coordinate interviews and maintain strong candidate experience

Use recruitment systems, Google Workspace, Zoho Recruit and AI tools efficiently

Maintain highly organized, accurate hiring records

Contribute ideas to improve sourcing strategies and hiring workflows



Over time, you will be trained to think like a strategic Talent Acquisition partner.



Who We’re Looking For

Bachelor’s degree preferred (Psychology, Behavioral Science, Business, or related field)

Early-career or fresh graduate with strong academic or leadership track record

Strong analytical and critical thinking skills

Tech-savvy and comfortable using digital tools and AI

Clear, professional written and verbal communication

Highly reliable, responsive, and accountable

Detail-oriented with strong follow-through

Open to feedback and serious about long-term career growth



We value initiative, work ethic, and learning agility more than years of experience.

This role is best suited for someone who wants to grow into a high-performing Talent Acquisition Specialist within the next 1–2 years.



Work Schedule

Full-time remote role

Night shift (aligned with us and the clients)

Stable internet and dedicated workspace required

Must be comfortable working independently in a remote setup

This schedule is ideal for candidates who are disciplined, self-managed, and committed to performance.



Why Join Us

Structured training and direct mentorship

Exposure to real hiring decisions and business strategy

Clear growth path into Talent Acquisition Specialist

Performance-based growth opportunities

Long-term career development in a growing remote company

title: Website Research + Spreadsheet Data Entry (Australian Pillow Products) – High Accuracy Required
description:
// JOB SUMMARY:

I need a careful Researcher / Virtual Assistant to build a spreadsheet of pillow products sold in Australia.



You will:

-- Visit each brand/retailer website

-- Open every pillow product page

-- Copy the required information into a spreadsheet

-- Repeat for all pillow products and variants



Important:

? 1 row = 1 pillow SKU / variant (one product you can buy).

? If information is not written clearly on the website, write “na” (do not guess).



If you do a great job, I will have many more similar projects.



(A SKU / Variant = a different version you can buy (for example: low vs high pillow, soft vs firm, cooling cover vs normal cover)).



Do NOT create a new row just because of size (Standard vs King) unless the size has different materials or different features.



// WEBSITES & BRANDS TO RESEARCH (Grouped by Category; use the Australian website where possible)

1) Online / DTC (Direct to customer)

- Koala

- Ecosa

- Emma Sleep

- Sleeping Duck

- Eva

- OneBed

- Origin

- Sleep Republic

- Peace Lily (Peacelily)

- Macoda

- Ergoflex

- GoKindly



2) Cooling / performance

- BEDGEAR

- TEMPUR



3) Orthopaedic / neck support

- Spinaleze

- Dunlopillo



4) Mainstream retailers

Important: For these retailers, you must capture all pillow products they sell on their website (and the brand of each pillow). If there are more than 30+ pillow listings, then just capture the top 30 best-selling and also tell me the total number of listings / pillows that that retailer sells (or sort by default sort order and capture the first 30 products).

- Adairs

- Sheridan

- Tontine

- IKEA

- Pillow Talk

- Bed Bath N’ Table (Australia) / Morgan & Finch

- Bambi

- Downia

- Sealy

- A.H. Beard

- Myer - just the top 10 sellers

- David Jones - just the top 10 sellers

- Harris Scarfe



5) Hotel niche

- microCloud



6) Budget / mass retailers

Important: Capture the top 15 pillow products sold on their website (and brand).

- Kmart

- Target

- Big W



// SPREADSHEET REQUIREMENT (Very Important)

- You will fill a spreadsheet (Google Sheets or Excel).

- Each row = one pillow SKU/variant.

- Each column = one data point (below).

- Use AUD pricing (Australia).



COLUMNS TO FILL (35 columns total)

A) Clear data points (must be 100?curate)

1. Brand

2. Product / model name

3. Variant name (e.g. Low / Medium / High, Soft / Firm, Standard height / Tall height, Cooling cover / Standard cover)

4. Product URL

5. Size / dimensions (if listed)

6. Price (RRP (recommend retail price) + sale if shown – include both)

7. Reviews on-site (# + average)

8. Pillow core type -- must be one of: Memory foam / Latex / Microfibre / Down/Feather / Wool / Hybrid / Other

9. Pillow core materials (exact materials, if listed)

10. Pillow core construction (solid / shredded / contoured / layered / etc.)

11. Pillow cover materials (exact materials, if listed)

12. Any liner material (inner)

13. Special fabric tech / coatings (cooling gel, phase change, antibacterial, etc. – only if stated)

14. Adjustability (Y/N + how)

15. Washability cover/core (write as: Cover: [machine washable / hand wash / na], Core: [spot clean only / na]. Include temperature if stated.)

16. Loft / height (if listed)

17. Target sleep position/s (side/back/front) if stated

18. Firmness rating / details (if stated)

19. Weight (if listed)

20. Any allergen / health claims (hypoallergenic, dust mite, neck pain, etc.)

21. Certifications / standards mentioned (OEKO-TEX, CertiPUR, etc.)

22. Evidence type (certified / tested / claim only)

23. Trial / returns policy (days + summary)

24. Warranty policy (years + summary)

25. Shipping (free threshold / cost)



B) Additional data points (still required, but some are your judgement)

26 .Positioning category (DTC / performance / orthopaedic / hotel / budget / retail)

27. Top headline benefits (3–6 short bullet points from the website)

28. USP summary (1–3 sentences: what makes it different?)

29. Tags (examples: Cooling, Latex, Memory Foam, Adjustable, Hotel, Orthopaedic)

30. Primary creative angle (cooling / pain relief / luxury hotel / eco / etc.)

31. Role in brand range (hero / entry / premium)

32. Your assessment of obvious weaknesses (1–2 lines)

33. Your assessment of likely buyer type (1 line)

34. Other notes / takeaways (1–2 lines)

35. Source quote (copy a short quote from the website, under 50 words, showing the main claim). Source quote must support a key fact (materials, price, washability, dimensions, trial/warranty). If the site is hard to quote from, add a screenshot link of the relevant section (price/materials).

 

// RULES (Must Follow)

- If a field is not clearly written on the website: write “na” (do not guess).

- Prefer official Australian brand pages. Use retailer pages only if the brand does not sell it on their AU site.

- If one product page has multiple variants: create multiple rows only when variant changes loft/firmness/material/cover tech.

- Use AUD. If on sale, include RRP + sale price.

- Use cm for all dimensions and height (convert if needed).

- At the end, provide a short summary: total rows completed, any brands/products you think might be missing, any problems you had (website blocked, missing info, etc.)

- Do not use AI to guess missing info. If not clearly stated on the website, the please write "na".

- Self-check 100% of rows before delivery.

I will spot-check 20% of rows. Accuracy is critical.



// PAID PILOT TEST (Required):

Before hiring long-term, you must do a paid pilot test (1-2 hours):

- Do Koala + Ecosa only (all Koala pillows + at least 6 Ecosa pillows).

- Deliver the spreadsheet with correct rows and quotes

If the pilot is excellent, you will get the full project + ongoing work.



// HOW TO APPLY (Important)

- Write PILLOWDATA on the first line of your application (so I know you've read all of these instructions).

- Tell me your hourly rate (USD or AUD).

- Share 1 example of similar work (spreadsheet research / competitor research).

- Tell me your ID Proof score and English test score (if available on OLJ).



Thank you and good luck!

title: Website & Growth Manager (Shopify & Wix)
description:
Website & Growth Manager (Shopify & Wix)



Pet N Pet is looking for a hands-on Website & Growth Manager who can own our website performance end-to-end from technical setup and design to conversion optimization,
 marketing, AI-powered improvements, and data-driven growth strategy. This role is perfect for someone who understands both web development and e-commerce growth and can turn traffic into real sales while guiding teams across marketing, content, and social media.



About the Role



You will manage and continuously improve our Shopify and Wix websites, ensuring everything runs smoothly while optimizing the customer journey to increase conversions and revenue.



You will also analyze website and marketing data, turn insights into actionable strategies, and communicate them across the team so content, social media, and sales efforts are aligned for maximum impact.



This role bridges technical execution with strategic growth, supporting the broader marketing and social media teams to drive traffic, engagement, and sales.



Key Responsibilities

Website Management & Technical Oversight



Manage and maintain Shopify and Wix websites

Execute website redesigns, layout improvements, and page optimization

Improve page speed, performance, and mobile responsiveness

Handle technical fixes, site maintenance, and coding adjustments (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)

Conversion & Marketing Optimization



Build and optimize product pages, landing pages, and checkout flows for maximum conversion

Set up and manage
 marketing flows: welcome series, abandoned cart, post-purchase, win-back campaigns

Implement customer segmentation and automation to increase engagement and repeat sales

Optimize business profiles, trust elements, and content (reviews, badges, FAQs, policies)

Integrate and manage analytics, tracking, conversion tools, and AI-powered personalization

Data-Driven Strategy & Cross-Team Collaboration



Monitor website, sales, and marketing data; translate insights into actionable strategies

Communicate data insights to content, social media, and sales teams in clear, understandable terms

Guide and support campaigns and marketing initiatives to ensure alignment with sales goals

Develop implementation plans based on data, ensuring all teams are executing effectively

AI Integration & Innovation



Experiment with AI tools to improve website personalization, content automation, and customer support

Identify opportunities for AI to enhance marketing performance and conversion rates

Social Media & Marketing Support



Support social media team with technical insights and data-backed recommendations

Collaborate to ensure marketing initiatives convert traffic into sales

Test, optimize, and refine campaigns across channels





To apply, please send your resume and a short cover letter and answer the following questions:





What experience do you have managing and optimizing Shopify and Wix websites, and what results have you achieved (conversion rate, revenue, or performance improvements)?



How do you use data and analytics to turn insights into a clear strategy or implementation plan for marketing, content, and social media teams?



Can you describe a specific example where you helped turn website or campaign traffic into sales? What actions did you take?



What AI tools or automations have you used for websites, marketing, or customer support, and how would you apply them to improve Pet N Pet’s conversion performance?



How do you normally collaborate with content, social media, and sales teams to make sure everyone executes based on the same data and goals?



Thank you!



Maggie and She!

title: Success Operations Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Success Operations Coordinator supports the onboarding and ongoing engagement of clients and their teams within the 10X Business Academy. This role focuses on executing engagement plans, monitoring participation metrics, and maintaining proactive communication to ensure a positive learner experience. The Coordinator partners closely with the Learner Success Manager to deliver consistent service, identify engagement risks early, and contribute to high client satisfaction and retention.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results-oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

• Participation, course completion, and engagement metrics consistently meet or exceed benchmarks, demonstrating strong learner follow-through.

• Engagement gaps or client concerns are identified early and escalated appropriately, preventing negative impact on satisfaction or retention.

• Client records, tracking, and reporting are consistently accurate and timely, while the Coordinator demonstrates increasing ownership, confidence, and readiness for advancement to Learner Success Manager.



OBJECTIVES

• Support seamless onboarding of new clients and learners by coordinating orientation sessions, tracking setup completion, and ensuring timely follow-up communication.

• Monitor learner engagement metrics daily/weekly (course progress, participation, attendance, logins) and escalate risks to the Learner Success Manager.

• Maintain accurate and up-to-date client records in CRM and learning platforms.

• Conduct scheduled check-in calls and
 follow-ups using approved engagement frameworks.

• Execute engagement action plans developed by the Learner Success Lead.

• Identify disengagement patterns early and recommend proactive outreach strategies.

• Ensure client inquiries are responded to within established service-level timelines.

• Prepare client progress summaries and engagement reports for review by the Learner Success Lead.

• Coordinate scheduling of kick-off/accountability/coaching calls.

• Support accountability tracking by documenting team participation and milestone completion.

• Assist in renewal preparation by compiling engagement history and performance insights.

• Contribute to continuous improvement by documenting common learner challenges and recommending process enhancements.

• Uphold client confidentiality and data integrity standards.

• Demonstrate consistent adherence to communication and service quality standards.



COMPETENCIES

• Demonstrates patience, empathy, and professionalism in client interactions.

• Clear verbal and written communication in a global business environment.

• Follows structured workflows, checklists, and SOPs with accuracy.

• Builds rapport and trust with clients and learners.

• Consistently meets deadlines and follows through on commitments.

• Ability to interpret basic engagement metrics and recognize trends.

• Maintains high accuracy in documentation and reporting.

• Adjusts quickly to new systems, tools, and evolving processes.

• Works effectively with managers and cross-functional teams.

• Knows when to resolve independently and when to escalate.

• Effectively manages multiple client accounts simultaneously.

• Operates effectively in cross-border client relationships.

• Demonstrates willingness to learn coaching frameworks and client engagement strategies.

• Comfortable using CRM systems, online learning platforms, and productivity tools.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Education, Communications, or related field preferred.

• 1–3 years of experience in customer service, account coordination, virtual support, BPO, or client-facing roles.

• Experience supporting global clients or working in remote environments is preferred.

• Familiarity with CRM systems and online learning platforms is an advantage.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

• Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY
