title: Learner Success Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Learner Success Coordinator supports the onboarding and ongoing engagement of clients and their teams within the 10X Business Academy. This role focuses on executing engagement plans, monitoring participation metrics, and maintaining proactive communication to ensure a positive learner experience. The Coordinator partners closely with the Learner Success Manager to deliver consistent service, identify engagement risks early, and contribute to high client satisfaction and retention.



This position is 100% remote.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results-oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

• Participation, course completion, and engagement metrics consistently meet or exceed benchmarks, demonstrating strong learner follow-through.

• Engagement gaps or client concerns are identified early and escalated appropriately, preventing negative impact on satisfaction or retention.

• Client records, tracking, and reporting are consistently accurate and timely, while the Coordinator demonstrates increasing ownership, confidence, and readiness for advancement to Learner Success Manager.



OBJECTIVES

• Support seamless onboarding of new clients and learners by coordinating orientation sessions, tracking setup completion, and ensuring timely follow-up communication.

• Monitor learner engagement metrics daily/weekly (course progress, participation, attendance, logins) and escalate risks to the Learner Success Manager.

• Maintain accurate and up-to-date client records in CRM and learning platforms.

• Conduct scheduled check-in calls and
 follow-ups using approved engagement frameworks.

• Execute engagement action plans developed by the Learner Success Lead.

• Identify disengagement patterns early and recommend proactive outreach strategies.

• Ensure client inquiries are responded to within established service-level timelines.

• Prepare client progress summaries and engagement reports for review by the Learner Success Lead.

• Coordinate scheduling of kick-off/accountability/coaching calls.

• Support accountability tracking by documenting team participation and milestone completion.

• Assist in renewal preparation by compiling engagement history and performance insights.

• Contribute to continuous improvement by documenting common learner challenges and recommending process enhancements.

• Uphold client confidentiality and data integrity standards.

• Demonstrate consistent adherence to communication and service quality standards.



COMPETENCIES

• Demonstrates patience, empathy, and professionalism in client interactions.

• Clear verbal and written communication in a global business environment.

• Follows structured workflows, checklists, and SOPs with accuracy.

• Builds rapport and trust with clients and learners.

• Consistently meets deadlines and follows through on commitments.

• Ability to interpret basic engagement metrics and recognize trends.

• Maintains high accuracy in documentation and reporting.

• Adjusts quickly to new systems, tools, and evolving processes.

• Works effectively with managers and cross-functional teams.

• Knows when to resolve independently and when to escalate.

• Effectively manages multiple client accounts simultaneously.

• Operates effectively in cross-border client relationships.

• Demonstrates willingness to learn coaching frameworks and client engagement strategies.

• Comfortable using CRM systems, online learning platforms, and productivity tools.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Education, Communications, or related field preferred.

• 1–3 years of experience in customer service, account coordination, virtual support, BPO, or client-facing roles.

• Experience supporting global clients or working in remote environments is preferred.

• Familiarity with CRM systems and online learning platforms is an advantage.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

title: Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Operations Virtual Assistant

(Process-Driven | High-Precision | Behind-the-Scenes Operations)



Job Overview



Maid In America Cleaning Services is hiring an Operations Virtual Assistant to protect schedule integrity, data accuracy, and operational consistency.



This is a behind-the-scenes execution role. You will not be customer-facing. You will work inside defined systems and SOPs to ensure our operational engine runs cleanly and efficiently every day.



If you enjoy structured work, moving quickly without sacrificing accuracy, and taking pride in clean execution, this role will feel natural to you.



What You’ll Do:



1. Scheduling & Job Management (Primary Responsibility)

You will own scheduling preparation and system accuracy for our TN locations.



This includes:

- Creating and modifying clients, jobs, and visits in Jobber

- Preparing future-day schedules for review and approval

- Creating training tasks in Jobber for new tea
mbers

- Re-sequencing jobs and rebalancing teams within defined guardrails

- Maintaining week-to-week schedule consistency whenever possible

- Flagging and correcting conflicts or inefficiencies early

- Executing same-day scheduling adjustments exactly as directed



2. Data Accuracy & System Integrity

You will ensure operational data is accurate, complete, and reliable.



This includes:

- Updating customer notes, job frequencies, and service details

- Invoicing customers promptly after service completion

- Calculating cost-of-service data after jobs

- Preparing timesheet and tips reports for payroll

- Logging complaints and rectified cleans accurately

- Creating and publishing weekly operational reports

- Manual KPI data entry

- Verifying work-to-labor ratios using company tools



3. Administrative Support

You will support operational structure and remove administrative friction.



This includes:

- Supporting the Assistant Operations Manager with administrative execution

- Maintaining internal trackers and shared documents

- Following established documentation and checklists consistently



What This Role Requires

- High pace with high accuracy

- Comfort with structured, repeatable tasks

- Strong attention to detail

- Clear communication when issues arise

- Strong adherence defined systems and guardrails

- Ability to work independently within clear expectations



This role involves a high volume of operational tasks that must be completed correctly and consistently. As the company grows, volume will increase — and this role grows with it.



Who We’re Looking For



Detail-Oriented & Reliable

You take pride in doing things correctly and thoroughly.



High Throughput Executor

You can handle volume without losing structure or focus.



Process-Driven

You work well inside defined systems and appreciate clear expectations.



Accountable Communicator

You flag issues early, own mistakes quickly, and ask for clarification when needed.



Tech-Comfortable

You’re comfortable using tools like Slack, Google Suite, Chrome extensions, and scheduling platforms. Experience with Jobber is a strong plus.



Experienced in Fast-Paced Admin or Scheduling

Background in administrative, dispatch, logistics, scheduling, or operations-heavy roles is

preferred.



Work Requirements

- Monday–Friday, 8AM–5PM U.S. Central Time

- Reliable internet with backup

- Dedicated workspace

- Backup power options in case of outages

- Fluent written English



Our Core Values

- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If these values resonate with you, we want to hear from you.



Important Screening Step (Read Carefully)



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

1. Complete our Culture Index survey: 

2. Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value you most resonate with (ALL CAPS).

3. Use a minimum of 5 Apply Points when applying

4. In your application message, include one sentence describing the most repetitive task you have performed at a high standard for 6+ months.



Applications that do not follow all instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Amazon Operations & Profit Growth Manager
description:
WE NEED CANDIDATES WITH PROFIT & LOSS ANALYSIS EXPERIENCE FOR AMAZON BRANDS



Position Type: Full Time

Location: Philippines (Remote)

Schedule: from 12nn, Singapore



WITH MONTHLY INCENTIVE UP TO 2X OF MONTHLY BASIC



About the Role



We are hiring an Amazon Operations & Profit Growth Manager to take ownership of Amazon marketplace profitability and operational health.



This role acts as the commercial owner of Amazon performance, ensuring revenue growth translates into sustainable profit.



You will oversee pricing strategy, unit economics, inventory efficiency, supplier costing, and margin optimization while working alongside a dedicated PPC specialist responsible for advertising execution.



Success in this role comes from understanding Amazon as a financial system, not just a marketplace.



Responsibilities:



Amazon P&L Ownership & Profit Management

- Own Amazon channel profitability and contribution margin performance

- Analyze full Amazon P&L including fees, logistics costs, returns, and operational expenses

- Identify profit leakage across SKUs and operations

- Build financial visibility across revenue, cost, and margin drivers

- Recommend actions based on financial impact, not vanity metrics

- Costing, Pricing & Unit Economics



Develop and manage SKU-level costing models

- Optimize pricing strategies based on margin targets and competitive positioning

- Evaluate landed costs including manufacturing, freight, storage, and fulfillment

- Improve contribution margin through pricing and cost optimization

- Partner with leadership to ensure sustainable profit growth



Supplier & Cost Optimization

- Manage supplier relationships and commercial negotiations

- Reduce product COGS through pricing negotiation and sourcing improvements

- Evaluate alternative suppliers when necessary

- Improve payment terms and purchasing efficiency

- Optimize packaging, freight, and storage costs



Inventory Management & Forecasting

- Forecast inventory based on sales velocity and seasonality

- Prevent stockouts that negatively impact ranking and revenue

- Maintain healthy sell-through and inventory turnover

- Reduce excess inventory and long-term storage exposure

- Balance inventory investment with cash flow efficiency



Reimbursements & Profit Recovery

- Audit lost, damaged, or miscounted FBA inventory

- Identify fee discrepancies and reimbursement opportunities

- File and track reimbursement claims

- Establish systems to prevent recurring operational losses

- Operational Performance Optimization



Monitor backend Amazon fees and operational expenses

- Identify underperforming SKUs draining margin

- Analyze return rates and operational inefficiencies

- Improve operational workflows impacting profitability

- Partner closely with PPC and marketing teams to align operational decisions with growth



New Product Financial Validation

- Evaluate new product opportunities based on profitability potential

- Analyze demand, competition, pricing, and margin feasibility

- Validate unit economics prior to launch

- Ensure new launches support profit expansion — not just revenue growth



Cross-Functional Collaboration

- Work closely with PPC, sourcing, logistics, and leadership teams

- Communicate financial insights clearly and proactively

- Escalate operational risks early with recommended solutions

- Align teams around profitability and sustainable growth



Essential skills and qualifications:

- 4–6+ years managing Amazon Seller Central operations

- Strong experience owning or analyzing Amazon P&L

- Deep understanding of:

- Contribution Margin

- Pricing Strategy

- Cost Structures

- Amazon Fees & Unit Economics

- Proven experience improving profitability through costing or pricing decisions

- Strong inventory forecasting and supply planning experience

- Experience managing supplier relationships or sourcing discussions

- Experience handling Amazon reimbursements and operational audits

- Advanced Excel / Google Sheets financial modeling capability

- Strong analytical and commercial decision-making skills

- Clear communicator in remote environments



Key Attributes for Success

- Ownership mindset

- Numbers-driven – decisions backed by data, not guesswork

- Consistency and discipline – stays on top of campaigns daily

- Proactive communicator – updates before being asked

- Growth-oriented – excited to scale a proven brand further

COMPETENCIES

title: Systems Coordinator
description:
Position Overview:  



The Systems Coordinator is responsible for creating, managing, and troubleshooting automation workflows in GoHighLevel (GHL) to support efficient operations across the company. This role requires at least one year of hands-on experience in GHL or a similar automation platform, along with strong analytical and problem-solving skills. In addition to system automation, this person will assist the Admin Operations Team with various ad hoc tasks and continuously seek opportunities to optimize workflows, eliminate inefficiencies, and enhance team productivity. 



 



Pay Range: $8 per hourwith a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents. 



 



About Power Plus Systems: 



Power Plus Systems, LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission. 



 



Objectives: 



Build, maintain, and troubleshoot automation workflows in GoHighLevel to support streamlined operations. 



Monitor performance of active automations to ensure accuracy, functionality, and timely resolution of system issues. 



Work closely with the Operations Manager to understand workflow needs and translate them into effective and efficient automations, while coordinating with Admin Operations and other departments as needed. 



Identify inefficiencies in current processes and proactively recommend workflow improvements. 



Assist the Admin Operations Team with various administrative and operational tasks, ensuring smooth day-to-day operations. 



Troubleshoot and resolve Admin Operations Help Tickets with a customer-service–focused approach. 



Manage and update pipelines, triggers, automations, forms, and integrations as needed. 



Ensure all GHL data, workflows, and configurations are maintained accurately and consistently. 



 



Competencies: 



Strong understanding of automation logic, workflows, and pipeline management. 



High attention to detail to ensure accurate configuration and troubleshooting of automation sequences. 



Excellent problem-solving skills with the ability to identify system gaps and propose solutions. 



Strong written and verbal communication skills to work effectively with cross-functional teams. 



Proficiency in GoHighLevel or similar automation platforms (HubSpot, Zapier, Make, Zoho, ActiveCampaign, etc.). 



Ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously in a fast-paced environment. 



Proactive mindset with a drive for continuous improvement. 



Customer service orientation when supporting internal stakeholders. 



 



Equipment Requirements: 



Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently. 



High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work. 



 



Education and Experience: 



At least one year of hands-on experience with GoHighLevel or similar automation platforms. 



Experience in operations, administrative support, or systems management is a plus. 



Familiarity with CRM logic, automation mapping, or workflow design is strongly preferred. 



 



Physical Requirements: 



Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer. 



 



Benefits: 



Growth opportunities in a well-established company. 



Ongoing training and professional development opportunities. 



Opportunity for advancement within the company. 



A supportive and collaborative work environment. 



Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time). 



Paid vacation.

If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below.

Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Pre-Chart Preparation Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Pre-Chart Preparation Coordinator plays a vital role in setting up each patient encounter for clinical success. This position is responsible for reviewing patient intake forms, health histories, and supporting documents to accurately transcribe relevant details into the clinical note prior to the appointment. By ensuring the provider has a complete, organized, and ready-to-review chart, this role helps streamline the visit experience, reduce administrative burden on providers, and enhance overall clinical efficiency.



Ideal candidates are detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable navigating medical documentation systems to ensure accuracy and compliance while maintaining patient confidentiality.



ABOUT 10X HEALTH SYSTEM

10X Health System, a subsidiary of Cardonce Ventures, is a pioneering company at the forefront of the health and wellness industry, dedicated to revolutionizing the way individuals approach their personal health and well-being. With a philosophy rooted in the principle that optimal health is the foundation for a life lived to the fullest, 10X Health provides cutting-edge solutions and personalized health plans designed to empower individuals to achieve and maintain peak physical and mental performance.



The company's comprehensive approach to health combines the latest advances in medical science, nutrition, fitness, and technology to offer a suite of services that include state-of-the-art diagnostic testing, individualized treatment protocols, and ongoing support from a team of world-class health professionals. 10X Health's commitment to innovation and results has established it as a leader in the health optimization space, catering to those who strive to push the boundaries of what is possible in their health journey.



OBJECTIVES

• Review patient health history and intake forms prior to scheduled appointments.

• Transcribe relevant clinical details (medical history, medications, allergies, lifestyle information, prior diagnoses, etc.) into the appropriate sections of the patient’s EHR chart.

• Ensure accuracy, consistency, and completeness of data entered into the pre-chart note.

• Identify missing, unclear, or incomplete information and flag for provider or clinical coordinator review.

• Collaborate with providers, wellness concierges, and medical coordinators to prepare patient charts for same-day and future appointments.

• Maintain compliance with HIPAA and all internal documentation standards.

• Verify that all required forms and consents are uploaded and properly tagged in the EHR.

• Support audit readiness by maintaining clear, accurate, and time-stamped documentation.

• Contribute to workflow efficiency by meeting daily and weekly pre-chart completion goals.



COMPETENCIES

• Strong understanding of medical terminology, health history documentation, and intake workflows.

• Excellent data entry skills with a high degree of accuracy and attention to detail.

• Ability to manage multiple charts simultaneously and prioritize tasks effectively.

• Clear written and verbal communication skills for internal coordination.

• Proactive problem-solver with a commitment to quality and timeliness.

• Familiarity with electronic health record (EHR) systems and documentation protocols.

• Commitment to patient confidentiality and regulatory compliance standards.

• Ability to adapt to evolving workflows and system updates.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Certified Medical Assistant (MA), LPN, or equivalent healthcare credential preferred.

• Minimum of 1–2 years in a healthcare, clinical support, or administrative documentation role.

• Experience with EHR systems required (DrChrono or similar preferred).

• Familiarity with patient intake processes, chart preparation, or scribe work highly valued.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce, Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates, and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

title: Bookkeeper with QBO experience
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

We are looking for a detail-oriented Bookkeeper to oversee the organization's financial record-keeping to ensure the business can make sound financial decisions. This position will be responsible for producing monthly financial reports, maintaining an adequate accounting record system, and managing a comprehensive set of controls, budgets, and forecasting to mitigate risks. The Bookkeeper will play a key role in enhancing the accuracy of the company’s reported financial results and ensuring those results comply with generally accepted accounting principles (GAAP) and bookkeeping principles and procedures. This position will report directly to the Finance Manager.



This position is 100% remote.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results-oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

• Timely and accurate delivery of monthly financial reports, reconciliations, and compliance filings

• Organized and auditable accounting systems with well-maintained digital records and controls

• Budgets and forecasts are submitted on time with clear variance analysis and actionable insights

• All payables, debt obligations, and tax filings are completed without delays or errors

• Trusted financial insights that support business decisions and reflect a strong understanding of GAAP principles



OBJECTIVES

• Maintain an accurate and timely record of all financial transactions and issue timely and complete financial statements

• Perform account reconciliation to assert the accuracy of transactions and entries in the accounting system

• Develop a documented system of accounting policies and procedures

• Monitor the accounting operations of subsidiary entities, transaction-processing operations, and policies and procedures

• Develop professionally by remaining aware of new state and federal regulations, participating in educational opportunities, and reading professional publications

• Ensure that all accounts payable are paid in a timely manner and all reasonable discounts are taken on invoices

• Ensure that monthly bank and credit card reconciliations are completed

• Ensure that required debt payments (company credit cards, loans, or lines of credit) are paid on a timely basis

• Develop and maintain an orderly accounting filing system (digital)

• Maintain a system of controls over accounting transactions

• Manage the production of the annual budget and forecasts

• Calculate variances from the budget and report significant issues to ownership

• Calculate and issue financial and operating metrics

• Coordinate the preparation and compilation of year-end reporting and financial statements

• Report and file state sales and use tax

• Reconcile all balance sheet accounts monthly

• Perform other duties as assigned



COMPETENCIES

• Demonstrates solid GAAP and financial reporting, technical skills

• Demonstrates proficiency with QuickBooks, XERO or other accounting software, MS Office Suite, Adobe, Windows, DocuSign, and Google Suite

• Proactive approach to problem-solving and process improvement

• Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment of change and growth

• Demonstrates knowledge of auditing, accounting, and corporate financing

• Possesses strong written and verbal communication skills, clearly communicating by phone or in person with tea
mbers

• Ability to prioritize multiple tasks and responsibilities

• Demonstrates a working knowledge of taxation and corporate structures

• Ability to successfully maintain a positive attitude while working in a team environment with competing priorities

• Possesses outstanding organizational and administrative skills



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Bachelor’s degree in accounting and finance, or equivalent business experience

• Minimum 3 years of progressive experience in bookkeeping

• Experience working with multiple legal entities under a legal umbrella

• Experience with financial reporting requirements



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

Prolonged periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce, Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates, and partners.

title: Business Analyst
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Business Analyst is solely responsible for owning, building, and delivering the Expansion Analysis (EA) and Target Market Analysis (TMA) components of the client-facing deliverable. This role transforms client data into actionable insights and collaborates closely with ETL, Client-Facing PR Teams, and Visual teams to ensure data quality, analytic integrity, and strategic alignment. The Business Analyst ensures that EA and TMA outputs are accurate, enriched, and directly tied to cohesive, data-driven recommendations.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results-oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

• Consistently deliver precise, insightful analyses that transform raw data into actionable insights, directly supporting client growth and decision-making.

• Ensure that each section of the client deliverable is cohesive and seamlessly aligned with other sections, creating a consistent and logically structured analysis that effectively communicates clear insights and actionable recommendations.

• Complete all analysis projects on time, maintaining a balance between speed and quality while meeting client expectations.

• Present findings in a clear, compelling manner, ensuring client teams and clients easily understand insights and receive actionable recommendations.

• Work seamlessly with cross-functional teams (ETL, Platform Review, and Visualization) to ensure accurate, aligned, and timely data analysis deliverables, proactively resolving data issues.



OBJECTIVES

• Deliver 5 high-quality EA and TMA analyses monthly, aligning with team deliverable targets.

• Ensure analyses achieve 100?curacy and strategic alignment with internal and client expectations.

• Produce insights that inform client strategies, such as increased market penetration and customer retention.

• Conduct market selection analyses to optimize Total Serviceable Market Opportunity (TSMO).

• Accurately segment and analyze client customer bases to refine retargeting strategies.

• Maintain robust stakeholder engagement, regularly interfacing with cross-functional teams.

• Provide data clarity by ensuring datasets are structured and enriched for insight-readiness.

• Leverage tools like Power BI, Microsoft Fabric, and SQL for data analysis and visualization as well as various data aggregation tools and subscriptions.

• Support data pipeline validation and ensure data integrity across all reporting layers.

• Document and present findings in a clear, actionable format to inform strategic decisions.



COMPETENCIES

• Expertise in data visualization tools like Power BI.

• Proficiency in Microsoft Fabric (Spark Notebooks, Lakehouse, Delta Tables).

• Strong ETL knowledge and ability to collaborate on data readiness.

• Advanced Excel, SQL, and familiarity with Azure Maps.

• Effective communication and stakeholder management.

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

• Ability to synthesize data into actionable insights.

• Adaptability and collaboration in cross-functional teams.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Bachelor’s degree in Business Analytics, Data Science, or a related field.

• 3+ years of experience in a similar role with a focus on market and customer analysis.

• Demonstrated ability to deliver high-quality insights under strict deadlines.

• Experience working with datasets for customer segmentation and market opportunity analysis.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

• Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer

• Must be able to operate standard office equipment and work for extended periods at a computer.



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce, Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates, and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:

title: Growth and Sales Manager
description:
About You 

You want to be part of something with massive potential, there from the ground floor. 

You thrive in environments where the expectations are high, the goal is challenging, the mission is clear, and the team supports each other to get better every day. 

You’re looking for a role with real responsibility, where you feel ownership over what you build. 

You are excited by working directly with a successful entrepreneur who invests in you. 

You want to build something that supports others through stable, dignified, growth-oriented jobs. 

You are a natural closer with a strategist’s mind — equally energized by understanding what makes people say “yes” and building the repeatable systems that turn those yeses into scale. 



Role Overview 

The Growth & Sales Manager is the engine behind Moonlight’s client acquisition strategy. As the Growth & Sales Manager you have a deep instinct for what drives people to say “yes” and the systems-thinking discipline to scale that into a repeatable process. You have a creative and entrepreneurial mind. You are adept at all lead gen tactics — whether it’s cold
, partnerships, webinars, LinkedIn plays, or unconventional outreach strategies. You will work closely with our Digital Marketer to bridge brand and performance — ensuring that outbound efforts are aligned with the broader marketing strategy and that Moonlight is continually being introduced to new audiences in compelling ways. 

Equal parts closer and strategist, this role is responsible for building, refining, and executing our entire outbound and inbound sales funnel — from lead generation through to conversion, onboarding, and renewal. This person is relentlessly outcome-driven, deeply persuasive, and thrives in a fast-paced, early-stage environment where growth is the mandate.



Qualifications 

? 5-7+ years of experience in a sales, growth, or business development role, ideally in a fast-paced startup or service-based business 

? Proven track record of exceeding sales targets and closing high-value clients through outbound channels 

? Deep understanding of sales psychology, lead qualification, and consultative selling 

? Experience designing or optimizing a high-converting sales funnel — from cold outreach to contract 

? Strong proficiency with CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Pipedrive) and sales automation tools ? Excellent verbal and written communication skills — persuasive, clear, and human 

? Highly analytical and data-driven with the ability to identify drop-off points and improve conversion rates 

 Creative thinker who enjoys testing and iterating on outreach strategies, messaging, and formats

? Comfortable collaborating with marketers, operators, and leadership to align growth across functions 

? Thrives in a lean, early-stage environment with high autonomy and a bias toward action 

? Excellent project management and organizational abilities; adept at balancing multiple priorities under tight timelines. 

? Comfort and skill in working remotely with distributed, multicultural teams 

Compensation, Growth, and Benefits 

? Competitive compensation commensurate with experience 

? Opportunity for performance-based bonuses as the company grows 

? Direct mentorship from the founder and CEO 

? 21 days of paid time off 

? Health benefits (in progress) 

? Philippines 13th month end of year bonus 



Apply here:

title: Expert Property Acquisitions Associate
description:
Summary

Role Overview

The Acquisitions Associate is responsible for building and managing Parity’s property acquisition pipeline. This role owns the front end of the development funnel: identifying absentee owners of vacant and distressed properties, maintaining a clean and accurate owner database, conducting outbound outreach, and negotiating purchase terms that align with Parity’s mission and financial parameters. This is a hands-on role that blends data management, outbound communication, negotiation, and coordination with legal and development teams.



Key Responsibilities

1. Acquisition Pipeline & Database Management

• Build, maintain, and continuously clean a database of absentee owners of vacant and distressed properties.

• Aggregate and verify ownership data from public records, tax data, and third-party sources.

• Track owner status, outreach history, responsiveness, and deal stage in Parity’s CRM or database.

• Ensure data accuracy, completeness, and consistency across systems.



2. Owner Outreach & Relationship Management

• Execute outbound outreach campaigns via phone,
, and direct mail.

• Respond to inbound inquiries from property owners.

• Build rapport with owners and clearly communicate Parity’s mission, process, and timelines.

• Maintain consistent follow-up to move owners through the decision-making process.

3. Deal Evaluation & Negotiation

• Conduct preliminary deal screening based on location, condition, and feasibility.

• Negotiate purchase price and basic terms within pre-approved parameters.

• Coordinate property walk-throughs and inspections with internal teams.

• Prepare internal deal summaries and recommendations.

4. Transaction Coordination

• Work closely with legal counsel, title companies, and internal staff through contract and closing.

• Track deal milestones and ensure timely progression to settlement.

• Maintain organized records of contracts, correspondence, and transaction documents.

5. Process Improvement & Reporting

• Help refine acquisition workflows, templates, and outreach scripts.

• Track and report on key metrics such as outreach volume, response rates, conversions, and acquisitions.

• Identify bottlenecks and propose improvements to increase acquisition velocity.



Required Qualifications

• 2–5 years of experience in real estate, acquisitions, development, sales, or a related field.

• Strong organizational skills and comfort managing large datasets.

• Experience with outbound outreach (calls,
s, mail campaigns).

• Demonstrated negotiation skills and comfort having direct financial conversations.

• Clear, professional written and verbal communication.

• High attention to detail and follow-through.

• Experience with property acquisition.

• CRM and database experience (Airtable, HubSpot, etc.).

• Comfort working in a mission-driven, fast-paced environment.

title: Direct Response Copywriter (Ecommerce)
description:
Who We Are

Mira Organics is a fast-growing eCommerce brand built by founders who scaled the company to 7 figures per month within just 2 months. We are now building our creative team and looking for people who want to grow with us and help shape the next phase of this company.

We move fast, we think big, and we reward performance. If you want to see your words drive real revenue and grow into a Creative Strategist role this is your seat.





The Purpose of This Role

The purpose of the Performance Copywriter at Mira Organics is to effectively communicate our team’s combined knowledge through the art of performance-driven copywriting.

As a Performance Copywriter, you understand that the success of your copy relies on three things:

The depth at which you understand the market their desires, awareness, and sophistication

The depth at which you understand Mira Organics' products physically and functionally

The depth at which your skill allows you to channel that understanding into headlines, briefs, and copy that drives desire, builds believability, and converts

As our Performance Copywriter, you have the power to move millions of people with your words. Your writing is the foundation of every scroll-stopping headline and every eye-catching creative we develop. 

Your active purpose at Mira Organics is to work alongside our Creative Directors and Strategists to write the messaging for ads, construct briefs for our creative team to bring to life, and strategize winning ad concepts to scale our clients profitably.



“Everything that exists once started as a thought. Shortly after, that thought was put into words.”





What You Will Do

Onboarding

Attend the initial brand kick-off call and absorb everything about Mira Organics' products, tone of voice, and customer

Analyze brand guidelines and deeply understand how we speak to our customers

Ongoing Responsibilities

Write Meta ad briefs for the creative team to execute

Write Meta ad headlines and body copy, congruent with the briefs you've written

Perform monthly market research to stay ahead of customer desires, competitor messaging, and emerging angles

Work alongside the Creative Director to ensure copy and visuals are aligned on every creative

Review live ads and analyze performance understand why your copy wins or loses

Share 1–4 research-backed ad concepts per month into the Creative Roadmap

Attend weekly team calls to discuss ad concepts, review performance, and collaborate on new angles





What We Are Looking For

Required Experience

2+ years of copywriting experience, specifically for DTC eCommerce brands

Proven experience writing Meta ad copy, headlines, and ad briefs

Native or fluent English speaker and writer

Comfortable working in a collaborative creative team environment

Understands marketing and consumer psychology — you know, or want to master, frameworks like Eugene Schwartz’s Stages of Awareness



Character Traits We Hire For

Strong ownership mentality you take responsibility for your output and its performance

Highly detail-oriented every word is intentional, nothing is sloppy

Curious and research-driven you go deep before you write

Coachable and hungry to grow you want to be better next month than you are today

Great communicator clear in writing, clear on calls, no ambiguity

Calm under pressure. Comfortable in a fast-growing, constantly evolving environment.





This Is NOT For You If...

You don’t have experience writing ads for DTC or eCommerce brands

You aren’t willing to do market research you just want to write

You can’t communicate clearly and proactively with a team

You are not organized or punctual

You don’t thrive in a fast-paced, high-performance environment

You are not passionate about growth personally and professionally

You want a comfortable, low-accountability job





Hours & Location

Fully Remote, Work from anywhere in the world.

Core hours: 

Monday–Friday

Flexible hours

Paid Holidays

Paid Sick Days

We care about output, not clock-watching.





Growth Potential

At Mira Organics, we highly value growth and development in all areas. With great performance, the potential for you as a Copywriter is significant: 





Grow into a Lead Copywriter and manage a team of copywriters.

Step into a Creative Strategist role where your ideas become the campaigns that drive revenue

Become the Creative Director who builds and leads the team behind a 8-figure brand

Working directly with founders who grew Mira Organics into a 7-figure a month brand in just 2 months

Becoming a key part of shaping the creative systems and strategy for a fast-scaling ecommerce brand

A great copywriter can be trained into a great creative strategist. We know this and we invest in it. If you’re ambitious, hungry, and committed to mastering your craft — there is no ceiling here.

Training & Development

At Mira Organics, we believe in long-term collaboration and growing together. Over time, we support your development through access to paid training programs such as:

Ecomtalent modules (valued at $100 per month)

Evolve modules (valued at $1,500 per month)



How to Apply

To make sure you’ve read the full post and are serious about the position, please send an application message that includes all of the following:

Your resume

A relevant portfolio of past work if (ad copy, briefs, or campaigns)

Your salary requirements

title: Amazon DSP Virtual Dispatcher (Experienced – Must Know Cortex & Scorecards)
description:
We are an established U.S.-based Amazon Delivery Service Partner (DSP) seeking an experienced Virtual Dispatcher who already understands Amazon last-mile delivery operations.



This is NOT an entry-level role. We are not training from scratch. Applicants must have prior experience dispatching for an Amazon DSP and must already understand Amazon systems, scorecards, and driver management.



If you have not worked as a dispatcher for an Amazon DSP, please do not apply.



Responsibilities:

- Live route monitoring and real-time dispatch support

- Managing Cortex and Amazon routing tools

- Supporting drivers with delivery issues (PNOV, DCR, reattempts, RTS concerns)

- Monitoring Netradyne safety events and escalating appropriately

- Tracking compliance (station scans, POD quality, geo compliance, SOP adherence)

- Communicating with OTR and station leadership

- Preparing end-of-day reports and tracking operational issues

- Enforcing company SOPs and holding drivers accountable



Requirements (Non-Negotiable):

- Prior experience as a Dispatcher for an Amazon DSP

- Strong working knowledge of Cortex

- Strong understanding of Amazon Flex app workflow

- Knowledge of Amazon Scorecard metrics (DCR, PNOV, CDF, DSB, etc.)

- Understanding of reattempt process

- Understanding of RTS procedures

- Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

- Ability to manage multiple drivers and routes simultaneously

- Strong decision-making skills under pressure

- Reliable high-speed internet

- Backup internet connection

- Backup power supply

- LMDMax experience (ideal but not required)



Work Schedule:

- Must be available to work U.S. time zones

- Weekend availability is required



Compensation:

Competitive hourly rate based on experience.

Please include your expected hourly rate in USD.



Application Instructions:

To be considered, include the following in your application:

1) Name of the DSP(s) you worked for

2) Number of routes managed daily

3) Average scorecard rating

4) Metrics you personally improved and how



Applications without this information will not be reviewed.



We are looking for someone who can plug in immediately and strengthen operational performance — not someone who needs basic training on Amazon systems.

title: Content Creator (Short-Form Video & Meme Production)
description:

Actively research and identify trending sounds, formats, and 
s

Someone who's already plugged into internet culture daily

Performance incentives:

Bonuses tied to views, engagement, and follower growth

The better the content performs, the more you earn

Long-term opportunity for consistent monthly work if performance is strong



Incentive Structure

GROWTH MILESTONES (One-Time Bonuses)

Unlocked once when total follower count hits the target

New Followers

Bonus

5,000+: $250

10,000+: $500

25,000+: $1000

50,000+: $
,000+: $3500



VIRAL HIT BONUSES (Recurring, No Cap)

Per video, every month, unlimited

Views/video

Bonus

100K+: $50

250K+: $100

500K+: $200

1M+: $400

5M+: $1000



THE MATH

Base pay is $400. But let's say you land three 250K videos and one 1M banger in a month. That's $500 + $100 + $100 + $100 + $400 = $1,200. Hit a growth milestone that same month? Add another $500-$1,000. The ceiling is on you.



SAFEGUARDS

Bonuses paid monthly, verified via platform analytics

Views counted 7 days after posting

Fake engagement = instant termination, no payout

If you're unsure where your article was posted you can use 
 to find where it was posted. I want to make sure you've written for reputable sources.

-Writing articles and product descriptions daily as assigned

title: Senior YouTube Content Editor & Growth Strategist
description:
Brand: Nations Without Borders





We’re looking for a highly experienced & competent video editor specializing in YouTube and short form to join our team full-time.



This is not a beginner role.



You will be responsible for helping us turn raw footage into highly engaging, retention-driven content optimized for growth.



You can check out our channel here:





What You’ll Be Editing...



Each week:

- 1 long-form YouTube video (12–25 minutes)

- Any where from 2–5 short-form videos (Reels / Shorts)



Platforms:

- YouTube

- Instagram

- TikTok



What We’re Looking For



You MUST:



- Be experienced in YouTube editing specifically (not just corporate or wedding editing)

- Understand audience retention and pacing

- Know how to build strong hooks

- Know strategies and techniques for retaining viewers past the first 30 seconds

- Know YouTube SEO (titles, packaging, optimization strategy)

- Know your way around YT Analytics & Studio and know which metrics to focus on

- Understand thumbnails and CTR

- Have motion graphics & animation skills

- Be proactive in broll and graphic selection

- Know how to color grade

- Be able to create graphics, callouts, lower thirds, visual storytelling elements

- Understand how to repurpose long-form into high-performing shorts

- Have experience growing channels



You should think like a creator — not just an editor.



Necessary Skills



Content ideation

- Hook writing

- Title testing

- Thumbnail strategy

- Understanding of YouTube CTR and retention metrics

- Experience growing channels



If you’ve helped grow a YouTube channel before — we want to know.





Tools



Must be highly skilled in:



-  Premiere Pro / Final Cut / DaVinci (advanced level)

-  After Effects (or equivalent for motion graphics)

-  Photoshop / Canva (for thumbnail support)



What Makes You a Great Fit



You:



- Take ownership

- Are Pro-active

- Care about performance metrics

- Study YouTube algo updates 

- Think long-term

- Are VERY organized with project files

- Meet deadlines consistently

- Want to grow with a brand

- You are interested in travel 

- You experiment with cutting edge AI tools



Position Details



Full-time

Long-term



IMPORTANT – How To Apply



To make sure you read this carefully:



Start your application with the word: "Your Future NWB Editor Here"



Send a Portfolio of:



3 long-form YouTube videos you edited 

3 short-form videos you edited

Any thumbnails you designed



If you are serious about YouTube growth and want to help build a international lifestyle brand — we’d love to hear from you.



PS - Please don't respond with a message fully written by AI. I'll be able to tell ;) 

PS - If you don't have experience with YT Studio/Analytics/Growth Strategy, then please do not apply.

title: Page builder
description:
Product Page Builder (Shopify) — Gempages (Template-Based) | Remote (Philippines Preferred)

Overview



We’re looking for a reliable Product Page Builder to help us build Shopify product pages using Gempages. This role is highly execution-focused: you’ll follow an existing page template and fill it with the assets and copy we provide.



This is a great opportunity for someone who works fast, communicates clearly, and wants to grow into more advanced work (advertorial / complex landing pages) as we scale.



What You’ll Do (Phase 1 — Template Pages)



Build Shopify product pages in Gempages by copying our existing templates



Replace template elements with:



images (provided)



copy/text (provided)



product-specific details (provided)



Ensure the page looks clean on desktop + mobile



Follow instructions exactly and deliver pages on time



Workflow



We typically request 5 pages per batch/day (shared in an Excel sheet)



No fixed working hours — results matter (if you finish fast, you’re done)



Since we’re in Europe, we may not be in the same timezone; small revisions are usually handled by us



Trial Period



Before hiring, you’ll complete 1–2 trial pages (paid or unpaid — depending on the platform standard). These are for products we may not launch; the goal is to test your Gempages execution quality and speed.



Requirements



Strong experience with Gempages (Shopify)



Good eye for layout, spacing, and clean design



Able to follow a template with high accuracy



Fast execution + consistent delivery



Basic English communication (clear updates)



Nice to Have (Future Growth)



Experience building advertorial-style landing pages



CRO knowledge (conversion-focused structure, readability, hierarchy)



Compensation & Growth



Starting pay: $200/month (Phase 1 — template-based pages)



If we find a winning product and scale, your pay increases to $700/month automatically



At the $700 level, tasks become more advanced (advertorial pages, complex builds), and you’ll get access to paid tools provided by the company



To Apply



Please send:



A short introduction (your experience with Gempages)



2–3 examples of pages you built (links or screenshots)



Your estimated time to build 1 template-based product page



Your availability (hours/day and days/week)



you can contact me on whasapp : 
, I'll provide the trial there and acess to my shopify

title: Executive Personal Assistant (UK Property & Personal Brand)
description:
We are a fast-growing UK-based property and consulting business looking for a highly organised, detail-oriented Executive Personal Assistant.



This role supports a property entrepreneur managing:

 • Property sourcing & deal packaging

 • Serviced accommodation operations

 • Investor communication

 • Content & personal brand development



We are looking for someone proactive, structured, and calm under pressure.



This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow with the business.



Responsibilities



Property & Business Operations

 • Manage and update Google Sheets dashboards

 • Track property leads and follow-ups

 • Organise investor documents and deal folders

 • Draft professional
s to agents and landlords

 • Maintain CRM / pipeline tracking systems

 • Create SOPs and improve systems



Serviced Accommodation Support

 • Assist with guest communication (templates provided)

 • Track bookings, maintenance issues, and cleaners

 • Update internal operations trackers



Administrative & Executive Support

 • Calendar management

 • Task management (Trello / Notion)

 • Research (agents, comparables, market analysis)

 • Weekly summary reports



Personal Brand Support (Basic)

 • Upload content (materials provided)

 • Organise content calendar

 • Light design editing (Canva)

 • Communication 



Requirements

 • Excellent written English (very important)

 • Strong organisational skills

 • Experience using Google Sheets & docs

 • Comfortable with systems and structured workflows

 • Proactive and detail-focused

 • Reliable internet connection

 • Able to work UK hours (at least 4–6 overlapping hours)



Bonus if experienced in:

 • UK property

 • CRM systems

 • Airbnb / serviced accommodation

 • Trello, Slack, HubSpot

 • Canva



Work Hours & Pay

 • Part-time initially (20–30 hours/week)

 • Opportunity to increase hours

 • Salary: $200 base pay + commissions

 • Performance bonuses available



Important – How to Apply



To apply, please answer the following:

 1. What experience do you have in real estate & personal branding?

 2. What systems/tools are you confident using?

 3. Describe a time you improved a system or made a process more efficient.

 5. Record a 1–2 minute Loom video introducing yourself.



Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.

Your responsibilities will include:

 • Cold

 campaigns

 • Lead generation and contact research

 • Appointment setting

 • Follow-ups with potential clients

There is no Instagram, no

 and LinkedIn)

title: Creative Strategist for Meta Ads
description:
We’re hiring a Creative Strategist & Copywriter for our  Dropshipping business, running and scaling multiple products through performance-driven Meta ads and data-backed creative testing. You’ll join a lean team focused on efficiency, and results.



The Role



You’ll build and document creative systems, SOPs, and testing frameworks from scratch, while writing high-converting ad copy and directing a small creative team.

Our ads run across multiple markets (Dutch, German, French, etc.), so you’ll also create SOPs for efficient localization and translation to ensure brand consistency and speed across all languages.



Main responsibilities



-Research competitor ads on
 Ad Library and identify high-performing

creatives in the health, beauty, and lifestyle niches

-Write and develop new ad scripts continuously so we can test and launch non-stop

-Create ideas and shotlists for new content production

-Develop strategic campaign concepts for different stages of the customer journey

-Propose new scroll-stoppers, hooks, and variations of winning ads

-Adapt competitor ads to our funnels for EU markets (NL, FR, DE, etc.)

-Analyze ad KPIs (CTR, CPM, CPC, ROAS, engagement) and report performance

clearly

-Suggest improvements for underperforming ads based on data

-Implement iterations of winning creatives to scale performance

-Conduct audience analysis and develop sales psychology insights

-Analyze new markets and build tailored creative strategies for entry

-Work closely with our ad editors to brief them on creative ideas and ensure fast

execution



What We’re Looking For



-Strong knowledge of
 Ads metrics (CTR, CPM, CPC, ROAS, etc.)

-Clear understanding of funnel dropshipping and how ads connect to conversions

-Experience identifying and creating winning creatives

-Ability to combine marketing psychology with data-driven decisions

-Comfortable leveraging AI tools for creative research and concept building

-Fast, motivated, proactive — execution speed is key



Requirements



-Fluent in English (written and spoken)

-At least 1+ year of hands-on experience with
 Ads in the 

space

-Proven ability to analyze performance data and generate creative strategies

-Full-time availability (40h/week)

-Strong internet connection and reliable computer



Rate & Benefits



-$7.50/hour (full-time)

-performance bonus for winning creatives

-Paid holidays after trial period (3 months)

-Long-term role with growth opportunities in a new and growing ecom company





How to Apply



Send your portfolio or examples of ad creatives, briefs, and/or strategies you’ve built.

Use the word "creative" in your job application so we know you read this far.



The recruiting process entails 1 interview & 1 assessment.

title: US Purchasing Agent
description:
About Us:

Bond Street Procurement is a New York–based FF&E procurement firm working behind the scenes on large-scale multifamily, hospitality, and mixed-use real estate projects across the United States.

We partner with developers and designers to manage everything required to turn approved designs into delivered, installed spaces—accurately, on budget, and on schedule.

What makes Bond Street different is how we operate. We run a transparent, fixed-fee procurement model, meaning our incentives are aligned with our clients’ success—not vendor markups or commissions. Every purchase order, invoice, and budget is tracked carefully and shared openly. That level of trust only works when the team is organized, detail-oriented, and accountable.

Our projects involve real complexity: large furniture packages, tight timelines, multiple vendors, and constant coordination. As a remote-first team, we work closely across time zones and value ownership, communication, and follow-through. Tea
mbers are trusted with real responsibility and have direct visibility into how their work impacts major U.S. projects. Strong performers grow with the company and take on expanded responsibility over time.



Hours: Full-Time, 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST



Job Description:

We are seeking a Purchasing Agent based in the Philippines to support day-to-day procurement operations and work directly with our Operations Lead.

This role is execution-focused and detail-oriented, responsible for keeping purchasing, tracking, and vendor coordination running smoothly across multiple active projects.

This position is critical to freeing up senior leadership to focus on clients and strategy—so reliability, organization, and follow-through are essential.

This is a core support role at Bond Street Procurement. You’ll play a key part in keeping projects organized, on schedule, and within budget—while helping the senior team stay focused on clients and growth. Strong performance in this role leads to increased responsibility and long-term career growth.

Key Responsibilities:

Procurement & Purchasing

Prepare and issue purchase orders for FF&E and OS&E items once selections and budgets are approved

Coordinate pricing, lead times, quantities, and specifications with vendors and manufacturers

Support bid comparisons, quote leveling, and value-engineering efforts

Ensure all purchasing aligns with approved budgets and project requirements

Vendor & Logistics Coordination

Communicate with vendors to confirm production schedules, ship dates, and delivery details

Coordinate shipments to designated warehouses and confirm receipt

Track order status and proactively flag delays or issues

Collect and organize invoices, confirmations, warranties, and related documentation

Budgeting, Tracking & Reporting

Maintain detailed tracking logs for purchase orders, deliveries, and payments

Support budget-to-actual reporting throughout the project lifecycle

Keep all records accurate and up to date in internal tracking systems

Assist with project close-out documentation and final reconciliations

Internal Support & Operations

Work closely with the Operations Lead on daily procurement tasks

Support standardized operating procedures for purchasing, tracking, and reporting

Assist with ad-hoc operational tasks as project needs evolve

Tools & Systems:

Fohlio — FF&E specifications, selections, and project documentation

Google Workspace — Sheets, Docs, Drive, and Gmail

Notion — internal tracking, documentation, and workflows

Qualifications:

2–5+ years of experience in procurement, purchasing, or supply chain roles

Experience with FF&E, furniture, hospitality, real estate, or construction-adjacent industries strongly preferred

Advanced proficiency in Google Sheets / Excel

Experience coordinating with U.S.-based vendors and teams

Highly organized with strong attention to detail and accuracy

Able to manage multiple projects and deadlines simultaneously in a fast-paced environment

Strong written and verbal English communication skills

Dependable and execution-focused, with a strong sense of ownership over work and outcomes

Proactive, resourceful, and comfortable working independently with minimal oversight

Team-oriented with a commitment to clear communication, accountability, and follow-through



What We Offer:

Full-time, long-term role with consistent EST hours

Paid Time Off (PTO)

Paid U.S. holiday leaves

Medical stipend after 3 months

Direct collaboration with senior leadership

Exposure to large-scale U.S. real estate and hospitality projects

Opportunity to grow into expanded operational responsibility over time

Clear opportunities for growth and professional development

A collaborative, supportive, and people-first work environment



How to Apply:

Interested applicants should apply using this link: 
/
/f/dp7a
/ZUKUOZ6RGYKKXI2C3R



Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview. Applications will be accepted until the role is filled.

Experience in real estate operations preferred.

description:

This is a direct-hire position (not an agency role) for a detail-oriented professional who can manage multiple transactions, ensure compliance, and support brokers and agents in a fast-paced environment.

Strong understanding of real estate contracts, transaction flow, and compliance requirements



Proficiency in Dotloop, MLS systems, and Google Workspace



Excellent organizational skills with strong attention to detail



Ability to manage multiple transactions and deadlines simultaneously



Strong communication and coordination skills



Reliable, proactive, and team-oriented work style



Experience supporting U.S. real estate transactions preferred

Direct hire — not an agency position

title: Real Estate Operations Manager
description:
Please Only Apply if you have more than 5 years of real estate experience



We are seeking a detail-oriented Real Estate Operations Manager to support our growing real estate team. This role focuses on transaction coordination, systems management, CRM upkeep, calendar and
 organization, and operational support using Google Workspace and related tools.



The ideal candidate is proactive, highly organized, and comfortable owning processes independently while working closely with leadership.



About Our Team

We are a fast-paced, high-producing real estate team with three tea
mbers and one in-house admin, closing 80+ transactions per year. While we operate at a high level, we also genuinely enjoy what we do. We work primarily with our own client base, value long-term relationships, and believe real estate should be both professional and personal.



We host client events, throw parties, and prioritize creating a memorable experience for the people we work with. We’re looking for someone who enjoys being part of a collaborative, energetic environment—someone who can have fun with the team while staying exceptionally organized, detail-oriented, and reliable behind the scenes.



This role is ideal for someone who thrives in structure, takes pride in clean systems, and wants to be part of a team that works hard, communicates well, and enjoys the process along the way.

title: Property Operations Lead (7 Units) – QA + Vendor Management
description:
We are a UK-based property investment and serviced accommodation (SA) management company. We operate seven serviced accommodation units and focus on delivering a consistent, high-standard guest experience through strong operational systems and quality control. Alongside SA operations, we run two to three active refurbishment/development projects at any given time, coordinating contractors, procurement, documentation, and stakeholder communication to deliver projects efficiently and to a high standard.



This is a hands-on Operations Lead role responsible for execution across our serviced accommodation portfolio and coordination support across refurbishment/development projects. Your core focus is proactive quality control and consistent delivery: you’ll enforce standards through checklists and evidence, ensure guests have a smooth end-to-end experience, and reduce recurring issues by continuously improving SOPs. In parallel, you’ll support project coordination for refurbishments by running follow-ups with contractors and suppliers, managing documentation, and scheduling appointments to keep workstreams moving without drift.



We’re hiring an Operations Lead who can run a cadence, enforce quality standards, and coordinate delivery across both serviced accommodation and active refurb projects.



Monday- Sunday:10:00-18:00 ( with 1 hour break) UK time, Saturday or Sunday off for one day.

Salary :700 USD Per month+ KPI bonus



Core responsibilities

Serviced Accommodation operations (delivery + standards)

- Enforce unit standards using checklists, photo evidence, and “definition of done” quality bars.

- Manage guest communications: fast responses, professional tone, calm resolution, and proactive updates.

- Maintain an issues/defects log and ensure issues are fully closed with root-cause prevention (not just “ticket closed”).

- Coordinate cleaners and operational VAs: confirm turnovers, verify quality, and drive consistent performance.

- Monitor pricing and availability: check pricing rules are being applied, flag risks/opportunities, and escalate recommendations.

- Create and update listings: listing setup, copy accuracy, amenities, house rules, photo requirements, and platform compliance (
 as applicable).

- Maintain and improve SOPs: update processes based on recurring issues, guest feedback, and operational learnings.

Property project coordination (admin execution)

- Maintain a project tracker for tasks, owners, due dates, and blockers.

- Source and compare quotes: produce a quote comparison table and recommendation.

- Follow-up with contractors, suppliers, utilities, council, other professional, keep reference numbers, paper trail, and next-step ownership.

- Documentation: build/format/update project packs, submissions, and version control.

- Appointment scheduling: inspections, contractor visits, deliveries, surveys, and access coordination.

Reporting directly to company CEO



Tools and working style

- We use Lark for communication, tracking, and internal workflows.

- Google Drive for document storage and document control.

- PMS/pricing tools as applicable (Hostaway/PriceLabs or similar).



Must-have experience

- Evidence-based quality control: Create and used checklists/audits/photo evidence used to enforce standards and reduce recurring issues.

- Serviced accommodation or hospitality ops: guest comms + turnover coordination + issue resolution.

- Property management working experience

- Vendor/contractor coordination: proactive follow-up, scheduling, and timeline control.

- Strong written English: crisp guest messaging and concise leadership updates.

- SOP ownership: has maintained/improved SOPs based on operational reality, not just followed them.

Nice-to-have experience

- Listing creation and optimization (
).

- Pricing/availability monitoring and familiarity with revenue management tools (e.g., PriceLabs).

- Property management operations or refurb coordination admin.

Personality traits we’re looking for

- Conscientious and detail-accurate.

- Proactive follow-up and ownership mindset.

- Structured and process-driven (lives in checklists/trackers).

- Calm, professional, and solution-oriented with guests and vendors.

- Improves systems continuously rather than firefighting repeatedly.

- Well organised with multiple task and able to prioritise



Hiring process:

Step 1: Answer the Google link below (required) and follow the instructions after.

Step 2: Answer scenario based questions

Step 3: Join 20-minute screening call

Step 4: Paid trial task

Step 5: Final interview + references



HOW TO APPLY:



Click the link

I’ll be in touch with you in 3-5 working days.



Please note, we ONLY accept applications through this application process. PLEASE DO NOT use the website’s message board as we don’t monitor this.

title: Western Europe Distribution Researcher
description:
We are a specialise manufacturer based in the UK with a range of anti-ligature products for the mental health market.  Headquartered in the UK, with facilities in the US and Australia, we are looking to expand into Western Europe (France/Iberia/DACH/Nordics/Italy) through a distribution model



We need someone to research and create a long list of c40 potential distributors across Europe, assessing and scoring their fit as a potential partner based on

 - commercial capability (current sectors/product range)

 - Sales capability (headcount, experience working with architects and construction tenders)

 - growth potential (appetite for specialist ranges)

 - operational fit (logistics capability, language coverage, aftersales support)



Through this exercise we want a short list of 15-20 potential partners that we can approach, including key contacts for us to approach.



Assuming you deliver successfully, we would then want to expand this research to cover other geographies in Europe, the Americas and APAC



We would expect this to take 5-10 working days to complete

title: Real Estate Data Research VA
description:
Please review this job post completely before applying.



Job Title: Real Estate Research & Data Analyst (Virtual Assistant)

Type: Full-Time, Long-Term

Hours: 40 hrs/week (EST)

Location: Remote

Start Date: Immediate (within 7 days)



About the Role



We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company actively acquiring off-market properties. We are looking for a Data Research Specialist to support our acquisitions team by cleaning, organizing, and preparing property data.



This is not a cold calling, marketing, or underwriting role. You will be working with data only — following instructions to identify qualified leads, maintain clean records, and provide accurate updates inside our systems.



If you’re detail-oriented, comfortable with large datasets, and confident in Excel and CRM work, this is a great long-term role for you.



What You’ll Do



? Organize and clean property records inside our CRM (REISift)

? Review and filter property data based on criteria we provide

? Upload/download lists from sources such as Zillow, PropStream, PropWire, and MLS (Jacksonville, FL)

? Use Excel/Google Sheets to clean and format bulk data sets

? Convert property reports from PDF to Excel using Tabula

? Flag qualified leads for the acquisitions team according to instructions

? Maintain accurate, consistent records and prepare weekly summaries of work completed



Must-Have Skills



? 2+ years working in real estate data research, list management, or related role

? Strong working knowledge of Zillow, MLS, REISift, PropStream, and PropWire

? Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills (downloading, uploading, cleaning datasets, using formulas)

? Experience with PDF-to-Excel conversion tools (Tabula or similar)

? Detail-oriented and consistent — accuracy in data cleaning is critical

? Reliable computer and high-speed internet setup for daily full-time work

? Good written English for reporting and notes



Bonus Points



? Experience supporting U.S. real estate investment teams

? Familiarity with skip tracing workflows

? CRM experience (REISift preferred)

? Ability to handle large data sets without errors



Why Work With Us



? Stable, long-term role with consistent hours

? Professional U.S. real estate investment team

? Clear systems and instructions to follow

? Opportunity to grow into higher-level roles as the company expands



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



We do not accept direct applications on OnlineJobs.ph.



Apply only using this link:


/1uMRkxneOR1Kn0C3UdI9_6A1avdy



Only applications submitted via the above form will be reviewed.

title: Urgent Hiring: Travel Related Social Media Manager
description:
Company Overview



We are a dynamic and rapidly growing travel company dedicated to providing unparalleled travel experiences across the diverse and enchanting continent of Europe. We are seeking a structured Social Media Manager to join our team and play a key role in shaping our online presence.



Position Overview



As the Social Media Manager, you will be responsible for developing and executing a comprehensive social media strategy to enhance our brand visibility, engage our audience, and drive customer loyalty. This role offers a unique opportunity to contribute to the growth of a vibrant company while immersing yourself in the wonders of European travel.



Responsibilities



Implement management’s social media strategy aligned with business goals and brand identity.



Create, schedule, and post social media content across various platforms, including but not limited to TikTok,
, Instagram, YouTube, and X.



Curate engaging, informative, and shareable content that highlights the beauty, culture, and experiences offered by the company.



Coordinate and review the creation of new content from a team of freelance content creators.



Daily engagement with followers across social media platforms to expand reach, impact, and generate sales.



Analyze social media metrics and assess the effectiveness of the strategy and content.



Regular alignment with the Social Media Ads Manager.



Stay up-to-date with social media platform changes and updates, implementing new features to enhance online presence.



Qualifications



Proven experience as a Social Media Manager or similar role, preferably in the travel and tourism industry.

Strong understanding of social media platforms, algorithms, and best practices.

Exceptional writing, editing, and communication skills in English.

Good eye for detail and aesthetics.

Ability to work independently, manage multiple priorities, and meet deadlines.

Highly structured and skilled at coordinating people and providing feedback.

Proven ability to create innovative and engaging video content is a plus but not required.



Requirements



Demonstrated success in growing and engaging social media audiences.

Passion for travel, culture, and the European experience.

Strong organizational and project management skills.

Proficiency in editing tools (e.g., CapCut) is a plus.



How to Apply



If you are enthusiastic about the world of travel, possess a creative flair, and have a proven track record in social media management, we would love to hear from you. Please submit your resume, a cover letter highlighting your relevant experience, relevant links to your social media profiles, and examples/portfolios of your work to
